```text
    21→const supabasePublic = createClient(supabaseUrl, supabaseAnonKey);
    22→
    23→export default function PublicFormPage({ params }: { params: { id: string } }) {
    24→  const formId = params.id;
    25→  const [form, setForm] = useState<FormWithFields | null>(null);
    26→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    27→  const [submitting, setSubmitting] = useState(false);
    28→  const [submitted, setSubmitted] = useState(false);
    29→  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
    30→
    31→  // Form data
    32→  const [formData, setFormData] = useState<Record<string, any>>({});
    33→  const [validationErrors, setValidationErrors] = useState<Record<string, string>>({});
    34→
    35→  // Multiple answer tracking - stores arrays of values for fields that allow multiple
    36→  const [multipleAnswers, setMultipleAnswers] = useState<Record<string, string[]>>({});
    37→
    38→  // Other field tracking - stores custom text for "Other" option
    39→  const [otherFieldValues, setOtherFieldValues] = useState<Record<string, string>>({});
    40→
    41→  // Track which fields have "Other" selected
    42→  const [otherFieldSelected, setOtherFieldSelected] = useState<Record<string, boolean>>({});
    43→
    44→  // Track uploaded files for fields with attachments
    45→  const [uploadedFiles, setUploadedFiles] = useState<Record<string, File[]>>({});
    46→  const [uploadingFiles, setUploadingFiles] = useState<Record<string, boolean>>({});
    47→
    48→  // Track reason values for Yes/No selections
    49→  const [yesNoReasons, setYesNoReasons] = useState<Record<string, string>>({});
    50→
    51→  // Page navigation
    52→  const [currentPage, setCurrentPage] = useState(1);
    53→  const [totalPages, setTotalPages] = useState(1);
    54→
    55→  // Date formatting helpers
    56→  const formatDate = (dateString: string) => {
    57→    if (!dateString) return '';
    58→    return new Date(dateString).toLocaleDateString();
    59→  };
    60→
    61→  const formatDateForInput = (date: Date | undefined) => {
    62→    if (!date) return "";
    63→    const year = date.getFullYear();
    64→    const month = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, "0");
    65→    const day = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, "0");
    66→    return `${year}-${month}-${day}`;
    67→  };
    68→
    69→  const parseDateFromInput = (dateString: string) => {
    70→    if (!dateString) return undefined;
    71→    const [year, month, day] = dateString.split("-");
    72→    return new Date(parseInt(year), parseInt(month) - 1, parseInt(day));
    73→  };
    74→
    75→  useEffect(() => {
    76→    fetchForm();
    77→  }, [formId]);
    78→
    79→  const fetchForm = async () => {
    80→    try {
    81→      setLoading(true);
    82→      const data = await FormService.getPublicForm(formId, supabasePublic);
    83→
    84→      if (!data) {
    85→        setError('Form not found or not published');
    86→        return;
    87→      }
    88→
    89→      if (data.status === 'closed') {
    90→        setError('This form is no longer accepting responses');
    91→        return;
    92→      }
    93→
    94→      setForm(data);
    95→
    96→      // Calculate total pages
    97→      const maxPage = data.fields.reduce((max, field) => Math.max(max, field.page_number), 1);
    98→      setTotalPages(maxPage);
    99→
   100→      // Initialize form data with empty values
   101→      const initialData: Record<string, any> = {};
   102→      data.fields.forEach(field => {
   103→        if (field.field_type === 'checkbox') {
   104→          initialData[field.id] = [];
   105→        } else {
   106→          initialData[field.id] = '';
   107→        }
   108→      });
   109→      setFormData(initialData);
   110→    } catch (error) {
   111→      console.error('Error fetching form:', error);
   112→      setError('Failed to load form');
   113→    } finally {
   114→      setLoading(false);
   115→    }
   116→  };
   117→
   118→  const validateCurrentPage = (): boolean => {
   119→    const errors: Record<string, string> = {};
   120→
   121→    if (!form) return false;
   122→
   123→    // Validate only fields on current page (skip section headers and descriptions)
   124→    const fieldsOnCurrentPage = form.fields.filter(f => f.page_number === currentPage && !['section', 'description'].includes(f.field_type));
   125→    fieldsOnCurrentPage.forEach(field => {
   126→      if (field.required) {
   127→        const value = formData[field.id];
   128→        if (!value || (Array.isArray(value) && value.length === 0)) {
   129→          errors[field.id] = 'This field is required';
   130→        }
   131→      }
   132→
   133→      // Validate email fields
   134→      if (field.field_type === 'email' && formData[field.id]) {
   135→        const emailRegex = /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/;
   136→        if (!emailRegex.test(formData[field.id])) {
   137→          errors[field.id] = 'Please enter a valid email address';
   138→        }
   139→      }
   140→    });
   141→
   142→    setValidationErrors(errors);
   143→    return Object.keys(errors).length === 0;
   144→  };
   145→
   146→  const handleNextPage = (e?: React.MouseEvent) => {
   147→    e?.preventDefault();
   148→    e?.stopPropagation();
   149→    if (validateCurrentPage()) {
   150→      setCurrentPage(prev => Math.min(prev + 1, totalPages));
   151→      setValidationErrors({});
   152→    }
   153→  };
   154→
   155→  const handlePreviousPage = (e?: React.MouseEvent) => {
   156→    e?.preventDefault();
   157→    e?.stopPropagation();
   158→    setCurrentPage(prev => Math.max(prev - 1, 1));
   159→    setValidationErrors({});
   160→  };
   161→
   162→  const validateForm = (): boolean => {
   163→    const errors: Record<string, string> = {};
   164→
   165→    if (!form) return false;
   166→
   167→    // Validate required fields (skip section headers and descriptions)
   168→    form.fields.filter(f => !['section', 'description'].includes(f.field_type)).forEach(field => {
   169→      if (field.required) {
   170→        const value = formData[field.id];
   171→        if (!value || (Array.isArray(value) && value.length === 0)) {
   172→          errors[field.id] = 'This field is required';
   173→        }
   174→      }
   175→
   176→      // Validate email fields
   177→      if (field.field_type === 'email' && formData[field.id]) {
   178→        const emailRegex = /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/;
   179→        if (!emailRegex.test(formData[field.id])) {
   180→          errors[field.id] = 'Please enter a valid email address';
   181→        }
   182→      }
   183→
   184→      // Validate Yes/No reason fields for select fields
   185→      if (field.field_type === 'select' && formData[field.id]) {
   186→        const selectedValue = formData[field.id].toLowerCase();
   187→        if (field.require_yes_reason && selectedValue === 'yes') {
   188→          if (!yesNoReasons[field.id] || yesNoReasons[field.id].trim() === '') {
   189→            errors[field.id] = 'Please provide a reason for selecting "Yes"';
   190→          }
   191→        }
   192→        if (field.require_no_reason && selectedValue === 'no') {
   193→          if (!yesNoReasons[field.id] || yesNoReasons[field.id].trim() === '') {
   194→            errors[field.id] = 'Please provide a reason for selecting "No"';
   195→          }
   196→        }
   197→      }
   198→    });
   199→
   200→    setValidationErrors(errors);
   201→    return Object.keys(errors).length === 0;
   202→  };
   203→
   204→  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
   205→    e.preventDefault();
   206→
   207→    if (!validateForm()) {
   208→      return;
   209→    }
   210→
   211→    try {
   212→      setSubmitting(true);
   213→
   214→      // Upload files to Supabase Storage
   215→      const responseDataWithFiles = { ...formData };
   216→
   217→      // Add Yes/No reasons to response data
   218→      for (const fieldId in yesNoReasons) {
   219→        if (yesNoReasons[fieldId]) {
   220→          responseDataWithFiles[`${fieldId}_reason`] = yesNoReasons[fieldId];
   221→        }
   222→      }
   223→
   224→      for (const fieldId in uploadedFiles) {
   225→        if (uploadedFiles[fieldId] && uploadedFiles[fieldId].length > 0) {
   226→          const fileUrls: string[] = [];
   227→
   228→          for (const file of uploadedFiles[fieldId]) {
   229→            const fileExt = file.name.split('.').pop();
   230→            const fileName = `${form!.id}/${fieldId}/${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).substring(7)}.${fileExt}`;
   231→
   232→            const { data, error } = await supabasePublic.storage
   233→              .from('form-attachments')
   234→              .upload(fileName, file);
   235→
   236→            if (error) {
   237→              console.error('Error uploading file:', error);
   238→              throw new Error(`Failed to upload ${file.name}`);
   239→            }
   240→
   241→            // Get public URL
   242→            const { data: urlData } = supabasePublic.storage
   243→              .from('form-attachments')
   244→              .getPublicUrl(fileName);
   245→
   246→            fileUrls.push(urlData.publicUrl);
   247→          }
   248→
   249→          // Store file URLs in response data
   250→          responseDataWithFiles[`${fieldId}_attachments`] = fileUrls;
   251→        }
   252→      }
   253→
   254→      await FormService.submitResponse(
   255→        {
   256→          form_id: form!.id,
   257→          response_data: responseDataWithFiles,
   258→        },
   259→        supabasePublic
   260→      );
   261→
   262→      // If thank you page is enabled, navigate to last page instead of showing full-page success
   263→      if (form?.enable_thank_you_page) {
   264→        setCurrentPage(totalPages);
   265→      }
   266→      setSubmitted(true);
   267→    } catch (error) {
   268→      console.error('Error submitting form:', error);
   269→      setError('Failed to submit form. Please try again.');
   270→    } finally {
   271→      setSubmitting(false);
   272→    }
   273→  };
   274→
   275→  const handleFieldChange = (fieldId: string, value: any) => {
   276→    setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, [fieldId]: value }));
   277→    // Clear validation error when user starts typing
   278→    if (validationErrors[fieldId]) {
   279→      setValidationErrors(prev => {
   280→        const newErrors = { ...prev };
   281→        delete newErrors[fieldId];
   282→        return newErrors;
   283→      });
   284→    }
   285→  };
   286→
   287→  const handleCheckboxChange = (fieldId: string, option: string, checked: boolean) => {
   288→    setFormData(prev => {
   289→      const currentValues = prev[fieldId] || [];
   290→      if (checked) {
   291→        return { ...prev, [fieldId]: [...currentValues, option] };
   292→      } else {
   293→        return { ...prev, [fieldId]: currentValues.filter((v: string) => v !== option) };
   294→      }
   295→    });
   296→  };
   297→
   298→  const renderField = (field: any) => {
   299→    const hasError = validationErrors[field.id];
   300→
   301→    switch (field.field_type as FieldType) {
   302→      case 'text':
   303→      case 'email':
   304→      case 'number':
   305→        if (field.allow_multiple) {
   306→          const answers = multipleAnswers[field.id] || [''];
   307→          return (
   308→            <div key={field.id} className="space-y-2">
   309→              <Label htmlFor={field.id}>
   310→                <span dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: field.label }} style={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' }} />
   311→                {field.required && <span className="text-red-500 ml-1">*</span>}
   312→              </Label>
   313→              {answers.map((answer, index) => (
   314→                <div key={index} className="flex gap-2 items-center">
   315→                  <span className="text-gray-600 font-medium min-w-[24px]">{index + 1}.</span>
   316→                  <Input
   317→                    type={field.field_type}
   318→                    value={answer}
   319→                    onChange={(e) => {
   320→                      const newAnswers = [...answers];
   321→                      newAnswers[index] = e.target.value;
   322→                      setMultipleAnswers(prev => ({ ...prev, [field.id]: newAnswers }));
   323→                      handleFieldChange(field.id, newAnswers.filter(a => a.trim()));
   324→                    }}
   325→                    className={`auth-input flex-1 ${hasError ? 'border-red-500' : ''}`}
   326→                  />
   327→                  {index === answers.length - 1 && (
   328→                    <Button
   329→                      type="button"
   330→                      onClick={() => {
   331→                        setMultipleAnswers(prev => ({
   332→                          ...prev,
   333→                          [field.id]: [...answers, '']
   334→                        }));
   335→                      }}
   336→                      style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}
   337→                      className="hover:opacity-90"
   338→                    >
   339→                      +
   340→                    </Button>
   341→                  )}
   342→                  {answers.length > 1 && (
   343→                    <Button
   344→                      type="button"
   345→                      variant="outline"
   346→                      onClick={() => {
   347→                        const newAnswers = answers.filter((_, i) => i !== index);
   348→                        setMultipleAnswers(prev => ({ ...prev, [field.id]: newAnswers }));
   349→                        handleFieldChange(field.id, newAnswers.filter(a => a.trim()));
   350→                      }}
   351→                      className="hover:bg-red-50 hover:text-red-700"
   352→                    >
   353→                      ×
   354→                    </Button>
   355→                  )}
   356→                </div>
   357→              ))}
   358→              {hasError && <p className="text-sm text-red-500">{hasError}</p>}
   359→            </div>
   360→          );
   361→        }
   362→        return (
   363→          <div key={field.id} className="space-y-2">
   364→            <Label htmlFor={field.id}>
   365→              <span dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: field.label }} style={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' }} />
   366→              {field.required && <span className="text-red-500 ml-1">*</span>}
   367→            </Label>
   368→            <Input
   369→              id={field.id}
   370→              type={field.field_type}
   371→              value={formData[field.id] || ''}
   372→              onChange={(e) => handleFieldChange(field.id, e.target.value)}
   373→              className={`auth-input ${hasError ? 'border-red-500' : ''}`}
   374→            />
   375→            {field.allow_attachments && (
   376→              <div className="space-y-2">
   377→                <div
   378→                  className="border-2 border-dashed border-gray-300 rounded-lg p-6 text-center bg-gray-50 hover:bg-gray-100 transition-colors cursor-pointer"
   379→                  onDragOver={(e) => {
   380→                    e.preventDefault();
   381→                    e.currentTarget.classList.add('border-[#3e8692]', 'bg-blue-50');
   382→                  }}
   383→                  onDragLeave={(e) => {
   384→                    e.currentTarget.classList.remove('border-[#3e8692]', 'bg-blue-50');
   385→                  }}
   386→                  onDrop={(e) => {
   387→                    e.preventDefault();
   388→                    e.currentTarget.classList.remove('border-[#3e8692]', 'bg-blue-50');
   389→                    const files = Array.from(e.dataTransfer.files);
   390→                    if (files.length > 0) {
   391→                      setUploadedFiles(prev => ({
   392→                        ...prev,
   393→                        [field.id]: [...(prev[field.id] || []), ...files]
   394→                      }));
   395→                    }
   396→                  }}
   397→                  onClick={() => {
   398→                    const input = document.getElementById(`file-${field.id}`) as HTMLInputElement;
   399→                    input?.click();
   400→                  }}
   401→                >
   402→                  <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
   403→                    <Upload className="w-4 h-4 text-gray-500" />
   404→                    <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Drag files here or click to upload</p>
   405→                  </div>
   406→                  <Input
   407→                    id={`file-${field.id}`}
   408→                    type="file"
   409→                    multiple
   410→                    onChange={(e) => {
   411→                      const files = Array.from(e.target.files || []);
   412→                      if (files.length > 0) {
   413→                        setUploadedFiles(prev => ({
   414→                          ...prev,
   415→                          [field.id]: [...(prev[field.id] || []), ...files]
   416→                        }));
   417→                      }
   418→                    }}
   419→                    className="hidden"
   420→                  />
   421→                </div>
   422→                {uploadedFiles[field.id] && uploadedFiles[field.id].length > 0 && (
   423→                  <div className="space-y-1">
   424→                    {uploadedFiles[field.id].map((file, index) => (
   425→                      <div key={index} className="flex items-center justify-between text-sm bg-gray-50 p-2 rounded">
   426→                        <span className="text-gray-700">{file.name}</span>
   427→                        <Button
   428→                          type="button"
   429→                          variant="ghost"
   430→                          size="sm"
   431→                          onClick={() => {
   432→                            setUploadedFiles(prev => ({
   433→                              ...prev,
   434→                              [field.id]: prev[field.id].filter((_, i) => i !== index)
   435→                            }));
   436→                          }}
   437→                          className="h-6 w-6 p-0 hover:bg-red-50 hover:text-red-700"
   438→                        >
   439→                          ×
   440→                        </Button>
   441→                      </div>
   442→                    ))}
   443→                  </div>
   444→                )}
   445→              </div>
   446→            )}
   447→            {hasError && <p className="text-sm text-red-500">{hasError}</p>}
   448→          </div>
   449→        );
   450→
   451→      case 'textarea':
   452→        if (field.allow_multiple) {
   453→          const answers = multipleAnswers[field.id] || [''];
   454→          return (
   455→            <div key={field.id} className="space-y-2">
   456→              <Label htmlFor={field.id}>
   457→                <span dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: field.label }} style={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' }} />
   458→                {field.required && <span className="text-red-500 ml-1">*</span>}
   459→              </Label>
   460→              {answers.map((answer, index) => (
   461→                <div key={index} className="flex gap-2 items-start">
   462→                  <span className="text-gray-600 font-medium min-w-[24px] mt-2">{index + 1}.</span>
   463→                  <Textarea
   464→                    value={answer}
   465→                    onChange={(e) => {
   466→                      const newAnswers = [...answers];
   467→                      newAnswers[index] = e.target.value;
   468→                      setMultipleAnswers(prev => ({ ...prev, [field.id]: newAnswers }));
   469→                      handleFieldChange(field.id, newAnswers.filter(a => a.trim()));
   470→                    }}
   471→                    rows={4}
   472→                    className={`auth-input flex-1 ${hasError ? 'border-red-500' : ''}`}
   473→                  />
   474→                  {index === answers.length - 1 && (
   475→                    <Button
   476→                      type="button"
   477→                      onClick={() => {
   478→                        setMultipleAnswers(prev => ({
   479→                          ...prev,
   480→                          [field.id]: [...answers, '']
   481→                        }));
   482→                      }}
   483→                      style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}
   484→                      className="hover:opacity-90"
   485→                    >
   486→                      +
   487→                    </Button>
   488→                  )}
   489→                  {answers.length > 1 && (
   490→                    <Button
   491→                      type="button"
   492→                      variant="outline"
   493→                      onClick={() => {
   494→                        const newAnswers = answers.filter((_, i) => i !== index);
   495→                        setMultipleAnswers(prev => ({ ...prev, [field.id]: newAnswers }));
   496→                        handleFieldChange(field.id, newAnswers.filter(a => a.trim()));
   497→                      }}
   498→                      className="hover:bg-red-50 hover:text-red-700"
   499→                    >
   500→                      ×
   501→                    </Button>
   502→                  )}
   503→                </div>
   504→              ))}
   505→              {hasError && <p className="text-sm text-red-500">{hasError}</p>}
   506→            </div>
   507→          );
   508→        }
   509→        return (
   510→          <div key={field.id} className="space-y-2">
   511→            <Label htmlFor={field.id}>
   512→              <span dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: field.label }} style={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' }} />
   513→              {field.required && <span className="text-red-500 ml-1">*</span>}
   514→            </Label>
   515→            <Textarea
   516→              id={field.id}
   517→              value={formData[field.id] || ''}
   518→              onChange={(e) => handleFieldChange(field.id, e.target.value)}
   519→              rows={4}
   520→              className={`auth-input ${hasError ? 'border-red-500' : ''}`}
   521→            />
   522→            {field.allow_attachments && (
   523→              <div className="space-y-2">
   524→                <div
   525→                  className="border-2 border-dashed border-gray-300 rounded-lg p-6 text-center bg-gray-50 hover:bg-gray-100 transition-colors cursor-pointer"
   526→                  onDragOver={(e) => {
   527→                    e.preventDefault();
   528→                    e.currentTarget.classList.add('border-[#3e8692]', 'bg-blue-50');
   529→                  }}
   530→                  onDragLeave={(e) => {
   531→                    e.currentTarget.classList.remove('border-[#3e8692]', 'bg-blue-50');
   532→                  }}
   533→                  onDrop={(e) => {
   534→                    e.preventDefault();
   535→                    e.currentTarget.classList.remove('border-[#3e8692]', 'bg-blue-50');
   536→                    const files = Array.from(e.dataTransfer.files);
   537→                    if (files.length > 0) {
   538→                      setUploadedFiles(prev => ({
   539→                        ...prev,
   540→                        [field.id]: [...(prev[field.id] || []), ...files]
   541→                      }));
   542→                    }
   543→                  }}
   544→                  onClick={() => {
   545→                    const input = document.getElementById(`file-${field.id}`) as HTMLInputElement;
   546→                    input?.click();
   547→                  }}
   548→                >
   549→                  <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
   550→                    <Upload className="w-4 h-4 text-gray-500" />
   551→                    <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Drag files here or click to upload</p>
   552→                  </div>
   553→                  <Input
   554→                    id={`file-${field.id}`}
   555→                    type="file"
   556→                    multiple
   557→                    onChange={(e) => {
   558→                      const files = Array.from(e.target.files || []);
   559→                      if (files.length > 0) {
   560→                        setUploadedFiles(prev => ({
   561→                          ...prev,
   562→                          [field.id]: [...(prev[field.id] || []), ...files]
   563→                        }));
   564→                      }
   565→                    }}
   566→                    className="hidden"
   567→                  />
   568→                </div>
   569→                {uploadedFiles[field.id] && uploadedFiles[field.id].length > 0 && (
   570→                  <div className="space-y-1">
   571→                    {uploadedFiles[field.id].map((file, index) => (
   572→                      <div key={index} className="flex items-center justify-between text-sm bg-gray-50 p-2 rounded">
   573→                        <span className="text-gray-700">{file.name}</span>
   574→                        <Button
   575→                          type="button"
   576→                          variant="ghost"
   577→                          size="sm"
   578→                          onClick={() => {
   579→                            setUploadedFiles(prev => ({
   580→                              ...prev,
   581→                              [field.id]: prev[field.id].filter((_, i) => i !== index)
   582→                            }));
   583→                          }}
   584→                          className="h-6 w-6 p-0 hover:bg-red-50 hover:text-red-700"
   585→                        >
   586→                          ×
   587→                        </Button>
   588→                      </div>
   589→                    ))}
   590→                  </div>
   591→                )}
   592→              </div>
   593→            )}
   594→            {hasError && <p className="text-sm text-red-500">{hasError}</p>}
   595→          </div>
   596→        );
   597→
   598→      case 'date':
   599→        return (
   600→          <div key={field.id} className="space-y-2">
   601→            <Label htmlFor={field.id}>
   602→              <span dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: field.label }} style={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' }} />
   603→              {field.required && <span className="text-red-500 ml-1">*</span>}
   604→            </Label>
   605→            <Popover>
   606→              <PopoverTrigger asChild>
   607→                <Button
   608→                  variant="outline"
   609→                  className={`auth-input w-full justify-start text-left font-normal ${hasError ? 'border-red-500' : ''}`}
   610→                  style={{
   611→                    borderColor: hasError ? '#ef4444' : '#e5e7eb',
   612→                    backgroundColor: 'white',
   613→                    color: formData[field.id] ? '#111827' : '#9ca3af'
   614→                  }}
   615→                >
   616→                  <CalendarIcon className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
   617→                  {formData[field.id] ? formatDate(formData[field.id]) : "Select date"}
   618→                </Button>
   619→              </PopoverTrigger>
   620→              <PopoverContent className="w-auto p-0" align="start">
   621→                <Calendar
   622→                  mode="single"
   623→                  selected={parseDateFromInput(formData[field.id])}
   624→                  onSelect={(date) => handleFieldChange(field.id, formatDateForInput(date))}
   625→                  initialFocus
   626→                  classNames={{
   627→                    day_selected: "text-white hover:text-white focus:text-white",
   628→                  }}
   629→                  modifiersStyles={{
   630→                    selected: { backgroundColor: "#3e8692" }
   631→                  }}
   632→                />
   633→              </PopoverContent>
   634→            </Popover>
   635→            {hasError && <p className="text-sm text-red-500">{hasError}</p>}
   636→          </div>
   637→        );
   638→
   639→      case 'select':
   640→        const selectedValue = otherFieldSelected[field.id] ? '__OTHER__' : (formData[field.id] || '');
   641→        const showYesReason = field.require_yes_reason && selectedValue.toLowerCase() === 'yes';
   642→        const showNoReason = field.require_no_reason && selectedValue.toLowerCase() === 'no';
   643→
   644→        return (
   645→          <div key={field.id} className="space-y-2">
   646→            <Label htmlFor={field.id}>
   647→              <span dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: field.label }} style={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' }} />
   648→              {field.required && <span className="text-red-500 ml-1">*</span>}
   649→            </Label>
   650→            <Select
   651→              value={selectedValue}
   652→              onValueChange={(value) => {
   653→                if (value === '__OTHER__') {
   654→                  // Mark that Other is selected
   655→                  setOtherFieldSelected(prev => ({ ...prev, [field.id]: true }));
   656→                  handleFieldChange(field.id, otherFieldValues[field.id] || '');
   657→                } else {
   658→                  // Regular option selected
   659→                  setOtherFieldSelected(prev => ({ ...prev, [field.id]: false }));
   660→                  handleFieldChange(field.id, value);
   661→                  // Clear the other field value
   662→                  setOtherFieldValues(prev => {
   663→                    const newValues = { ...prev };
   664→                    delete newValues[field.id];
   665→                    return newValues;
   666→                  });
   667→
   668→                  // Clear reason if switching away from Yes/No
   669→                  if (value.toLowerCase() !== 'yes' && value.toLowerCase() !== 'no') {
   670→                    setYesNoReasons(prev => {
   671→                      const newReasons = { ...prev };
   672→                      delete newReasons[field.id];
   673→                      return newReasons;
   674→                    });
   675→                  }
   676→                }
   677→              }}
   678→            >
   679→              <SelectTrigger className={`auth-input ${hasError ? 'border-red-500' : ''}`}>
   680→                <SelectValue placeholder="Select an option" />
   681→              </SelectTrigger>
   682→              <SelectContent>
   683→                {field.options?.map((option: string) => (
   684→                  <SelectItem key={option} value={option}>
   685→                    {option}
   686→                  </SelectItem>
   687→                ))}
   688→                {field.include_other && (
   689→                  <SelectItem value="__OTHER__">Other</SelectItem>
   690→                )}
   691→              </SelectContent>
   692→            </Select>
   693→            {otherFieldSelected[field.id] && (
   694→              <Input
   695→                placeholder="Please specify..."
   696→                value={otherFieldValues[field.id] || ''}
   697→                onChange={(e) => {
   698→                  const value = e.target.value;
   699→                  setOtherFieldValues(prev => ({ ...prev, [field.id]: value }));
   700→                  // Store the actual value in formData
   701→                  handleFieldChange(field.id, value);
   702→                }}
   703→                className="auth-input mt-2"
   704→              />
   705→            )}
   706→            {showYesReason && (
   707→              <div className="mt-2">
   708→                <Textarea
   709→                  id={`${field.id}-yes-reason`}
   710→                  value={yesNoReasons[field.id] || ''}
   711→                  onChange={(e) => {
   712→                    setYesNoReasons(prev => ({ ...prev, [field.id]: e.target.value }));
   713→                  }}
   714→                  className="auth-input"
   715→                  rows={3}
   716→                />
   717→              </div>
   718→            )}
   719→            {showNoReason && (
   720→              <div className="mt-2">
   721→                <Textarea
   722→                  id={`${field.id}-no-reason`}
   723→                  value={yesNoReasons[field.id] || ''}
   724→                  onChange={(e) => {
   725→                    setYesNoReasons(prev => ({ ...prev, [field.id]: e.target.value }));
   726→                  }}
   727→                  className="auth-input"
   728→                  rows={3}
   729→                />
   730→              </div>
   731→            )}
   732→            {hasError && <p className="text-sm text-red-500">{hasError}</p>}
   733→          </div>
   734→        );
   735→
   736→      case 'radio':
   737→        return (
   738→          <div key={field.id} className="space-y-2">
   739→            <Label>
   740→              <span dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: field.label }} style={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' }} />
   741→              {field.required && <span className="text-red-500 ml-1">*</span>}
   742→            </Label>
   743→            <RadioGroup value={formData[field.id] || ''} onValueChange={(value) => handleFieldChange(field.id, value)}>
   744→              <div className="space-y-2">
   745→                {field.options?.map((option: string) => (
   746→                  <div key={option} className="flex items-center space-x-2">
   747→                    <RadioGroupItem value={option} id={`${field.id}-${option}`} />
   748→                    <Label htmlFor={`${field.id}-${option}`} className="font-normal cursor-pointer">
   749→                      {option}
   750→                    </Label>
   751→                  </div>
   752→                ))}
   753→              </div>
   754→            </RadioGroup>
   755→            {hasError && <p className="text-sm text-red-500">{hasError}</p>}
   756→          </div>
   757→        );
   758→
   759→      case 'checkbox':
   760→        return (
   761→          <div key={field.id} className="space-y-2">
   762→            <Label>
   763→              <span dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: field.label }} style={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' }} />
   764→              {field.required && <span className="text-red-500 ml-1">*</span>}
   765→            </Label>
   766→            <div className="space-y-2">
   767→              {field.options?.map((option: string) => (
   768→                <div key={option} className="flex items-center space-x-2">
   769→                  <Checkbox
   770→                    id={`${field.id}-${option}`}
   771→                    checked={formData[field.id]?.includes(option) || false}
   772→                    onCheckedChange={(checked) => handleCheckboxChange(field.id, option, checked as boolean)}
   773→                  />
   774→                  <Label htmlFor={`${field.id}-${option}`} className="font-normal cursor-pointer">
   775→                    {option}
   776→                  </Label>
   777→                </div>
   778→              ))}
   779→              {field.include_other && (
   780→                <>
   781→                  <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
   782→                    <Checkbox
   783→                      id={`${field.id}-__OTHER__`}
   784→                      checked={formData[field.id]?.includes('__OTHER__') || false}
   785→                      onCheckedChange={(checked) => {
   786→                        handleCheckboxChange(field.id, '__OTHER__', checked as boolean);
   787→                        if (!checked) {
   788→                          // Clear the other field value when unchecked
   789→                          setOtherFieldValues(prev => ({ ...prev, [field.id]: '' }));
   790→                        }
   791→                      }}
   792→                    />
   793→                    <Label htmlFor={`${field.id}-__OTHER__`} className="font-normal cursor-pointer">
   794→                      Other
   795→                    </Label>
   796→                  </div>
   797→                  {formData[field.id]?.includes('__OTHER__') && (
   798→                    <Input
   799→                      placeholder="Please specify..."
   800→                      value={otherFieldValues[field.id] || ''}
   801→                      onChange={(e) => setOtherFieldValues(prev => ({ ...prev, [field.id]: e.target.value }))}
   802→                      className="ml-6"
   803→                    />
   804→                  )}
   805→                </>
   806→              )}
   807→            </div>
   808→            {hasError && <p className="text-sm text-red-500">{hasError}</p>}
   809→          </div>
   810→        );
   811→
   812→      case 'section':
   813→        return (
   814→          <div key={field.id} className="py-4">
   815→            <div className="font-bold text-gray-900 border-b-2 border-gray-300 pb-2" style={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' }} dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: field.label }} />
   816→          </div>
   817→        );
   818→
   819→      case 'description':
   820→        return (
   821→          <div key={field.id} className="py-2">
   822→            <div className="text-gray-600" style={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' }} dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: field.label }} />
   823→          </div>
   824→        );
   825→
   826→      case 'link':
   827→        try {
   828→          const linkUrl = (Array.isArray(field.options) && field.options.length > 0) ? field.options[0] : '';
   829→          const linkTitle = field.label ? String(field.label).replace(/<[^>]*>/g, '').trim() || 'Embedded content' : 'Embedded content';
   830→
   831→          if (!linkUrl) {
   832→            return null;
   833→          }
   834→
   835→          return (
   836→            <div key={field.id} className="space-y-2">
   837→              {field.label && typeof field.label === 'string' && (
   838→                <div className="font-medium text-gray-900" dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: field.label }} style={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' }} />
   839→              )}
   840→              <div className="w-full border rounded-lg overflow-hidden bg-gray-50">
   841→                <iframe
   842→                  src={linkUrl}
   843→                  className="w-full"
   844→                  style={{ height: '600px', border: 'none' }}
   845→                  title={linkTitle}
   846→                  allowFullScreen
   847→                />
   848→              </div>
   849→            </div>
   850→          );
   851→        } catch (error) {
   852→          console.error('Error rendering link field:', error);
   853→          return null;
   854→        }
   855→
   856→      default:
   857→        return null;
   858→    }
   859→  };
   860→
   861→  // Loading state
   862→  if (loading) {
   863→    return (
   864→      <div className="min-h-screen bg-white flex items-center justify-center">
   865→        <div className="text-center">
   866→          <Loader className="h-12 w-12 animate-spin text-[#3e8692] mx-auto mb-4" />
   867→          <p className="text-gray-600 text-lg font-medium">Loading form...</p>
   868→        </div>
   869→      </div>
   870→    );
   871→  }
   872→
   873→  // Error state
   874→  if (error) {
   875→    return (
   876→      <div className="min-h-screen bg-white flex items-center justify-center px-6">
   877→        <div className="text-center max-w-md">
   878→          <div className="flex justify-center mb-6">
   879→            <Image src="/images/logo.png" alt="Logo" width={60} height={60} className="rounded-xl" />
   880→          </div>
   881→          <div className="rounded-full bg-red-50 p-4 w-20 h-20 mx-auto mb-6 flex items-center justify-center">
   882→            <FileText className="h-10 w-10 text-red-500" />
   883→          </div>
   884→          <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">Form Not Available</h2>
   885→          <p className="text-lg text-gray-600 leading-relaxed">{error}</p>
   886→        </div>
   887→      </div>
   888→    );
   889→  }
   890→
   891→  // Success state - only show full-page success if thank you page is NOT enabled
   892→  if (submitted && !form?.enable_thank_you_page) {
   893→    return (
   894→      <div className="min-h-screen bg-white flex items-center justify-center px-6">
   895→        <div className="text-center max-w-md">
   896→          <div className="flex justify-center mb-6">
   897→            <Image src="/images/logo.png" alt="Logo" width={60} height={60} className="rounded-xl" />
   898→          </div>
   899→          <div className="rounded-full bg-green-50 p-4 w-20 h-20 mx-auto mb-6 flex items-center justify-center">
   900→            <CheckCircle2 className="h-10 w-10 text-green-600" />
   901→          </div>
   902→          <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">Thank you!</h2>
   903→          <p className="text-lg text-gray-600 leading-relaxed">Your response has been submitted successfully.</p>
   904→        </div>
   905→      </div>
   906→    );
   907→  }
   908→
   909→  // Form state
   910→  return (
   911→    <div className="min-h-screen bg-white">
   912→      <div className="max-w-2xl mx-auto px-6 py-16">
   913→        {/* Logo and Title */}
   914→        <div className="text-center mb-12">
   915→          <div className="flex justify-center mb-6">
   916→            <Image src="/images/logo.png" alt="Logo" width={60} height={60} className="rounded-xl" />
   917→          </div>
   918→          <h1 className="text-4xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">{form?.name}</h1>
   919→          {form?.description && (
   920→            <p className="text-lg text-gray-600 leading-relaxed max-w-xl mx-auto">{form.description}</p>
   921→          )}
   922→        </div>
   923→
   924→        {/* Form Content */}
   925→        <div className="max-w-xl mx-auto">
   926→          <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-8">
   927→              {/* Page indicator */}
   928→              {totalPages > 1 && (
   929→                <div className="flex justify-center mb-8">
   930→                  <div className="flex gap-2">
   931→                    {Array.from({ length: totalPages }, (_, i) => i + 1).map((pageNum) => (
   932→                      <div
   933→                        key={pageNum}
   934→                        className={`h-2 rounded-full transition-all duration-300 ${
   935→                          pageNum === currentPage
   936→                            ? 'bg-[#3e8692] w-8'
   937→                            : pageNum < currentPage
   938→                            ? 'bg-[#3e8692] opacity-30 w-2'
   939→                            : 'bg-gray-300 w-2'
   940→                        }`}
   941→                      />
   942→                    ))}
   943→                  </div>
   944→                </div>
   945→              )}
   946→
   947→              {/* Form fields for current page */}
   948→              {form?.fields
   949→                .filter(field => field.page_number === currentPage)
   950→                .map(field => renderField(field))}
   951→
   952→              {/* Navigation buttons - hide when on thank you page after submission */}
   953→              {!(form?.enable_thank_you_page && currentPage === totalPages && submitted) && (
   954→                <div className="pt-8 flex gap-4 justify-center items-center">
   955→                  {currentPage > 1 && !submitted && (
   956→                    <Button
   957→                      type="button"
   958→                      onClick={handlePreviousPage}
   959→                      className="px-6 h-12 text-base font-medium rounded-lg bg-white border border-gray-300 text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50 hover:border-gray-400 transition-all flex items-center gap-2"
   960→                    >
   961→                      <ChevronLeft className="h-5 w-5" />
   962→                      Previous
   963→                    </Button>
   964→                  )}
   965→                  {/* Show Next button or Submit button based on current page and thank you page setting */}
   966→                  {(form?.enable_thank_you_page && currentPage < totalPages - 1) || (!form?.enable_thank_you_page && currentPage < totalPages) ? (
   967→                    <Button
   968→                      type="button"
   969→                      onClick={handleNextPage}
   970→                      className="px-6 h-12 text-base font-medium rounded-lg bg-[#3e8692] hover:bg-[#2d6570] text-white transition-all flex items-center gap-2"
   971→                    >
   972→                      Next
   973→                      <ChevronRight className="h-5 w-5" />
   974→                    </Button>
   975→                  ) : !submitted && (
   976→                    <Button
   977→                      type="submit"
   978→                      disabled={submitting}
   979→                      className="px-6 h-12 text-base font-medium rounded-lg bg-[#3e8692] hover:bg-[#2d6570] text-white transition-all disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed flex items-center gap-2"
   980→                    >
   981→                      {submitting ? (
   982→                        <>
   983→                          <Loader className="h-5 w-5 animate-spin" />
   984→                          Submitting...
   985→                        </>
   986→                      ) : (
   987→                        <>
   988→                          Submit
   989→                          <ChevronRight className="h-5 w-5" />
   990→                        </>
   991→                      )}
   992→                    </Button>
   993→                  )}
   994→                </div>
   995→              )}
   996→
   997→            </form>
   998→          </div>
   999→        </div>
  1000→      </div>
  1001→  );
  1002→}
  1003→
  1004→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>

 `./app/api/forms/submit/route.ts`

```text
     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';
     2→import { createClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js';
     3→import { Database } from '@/lib/database.types';
     4→import { TelegramService } from '@/lib/telegramService';
     5→
     6→export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic';
     7→
     8→export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
     9→  try {
    10→    const body = await request.json();
    11→    const { form_id, response_data, submitted_by_email, submitted_by_name } = body;
    12→
    13→    // Validate required fields
    14→    if (!form_id || !response_data) {
    15→      return NextResponse.json(
    16→        { error: 'Missing required fields: form_id and response_data' },
    17→        { status: 400 }
    18→      );
    19→    }
    20→
    21→    // Create server-side Supabase client with service role key to bypass RLS
    22→    const supabaseUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL;
    23→    const supabaseServiceKey = process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY;
    24→
    25→    if (!supabaseUrl || !supabaseServiceKey) {
    26→      console.error('Missing Supabase environment variables');
    27→      return NextResponse.json(
    28→        { error: 'Server configuration error' },
    29→        { status: 500 }
    30→      );
    31→    }
    32→
    33→    const supabaseAdmin = createClient<Database>(supabaseUrl, supabaseServiceKey, {
    34→      auth: {
    35→        autoRefreshToken: false,
    36→        persistSession: false
    37→      }
    38→    });
    39→
    40→    // Insert form response
    41→    const { data: response, error } = await supabaseAdmin
    42→      .from('form_responses')
    43→      .insert([{
    44→        form_id,
    45→        response_data,
    46→        submitted_by_email: submitted_by_email || null,
    47→        submitted_by_name: submitted_by_name || null
    48→      }])
    49→      .select()
    50→      .single();
    51→
    52→    if (error) {
    53→      console.error('Error inserting form response:', error);
    54→      return NextResponse.json(
    55→        { error: 'Failed to submit form response' },
    56→        { status: 500 }
    57→      );
    58→    }
    59→
    60→    // Fetch form details for Telegram notification
    61→    const { data: form } = await supabaseAdmin
    62→      .from('forms')
    63→      .select('name')
    64→      .eq('id', form_id)
    65→      .single();
    66→
    67→    console.log('[Form Submit] Sending Telegram notification for form:', {
    68→      formId: form_id,
    69→      formName: form?.name,
    70→      hasSubmitterName: !!submitted_by_name,
    71→      hasSubmitterEmail: !!submitted_by_email
    72→    });
    73→
    74→    // Send Telegram notification (wait for it but don't fail if it errors)
    75→    try {
    76→      const telegramSuccess = await TelegramService.sendFormSubmissionNotification(
    77→        form?.name || 'Unknown Form',
    78→        form_id,
    79→        {
    80→          name: submitted_by_name,
    81→          email: submitted_by_email,
    82→        },
    83→        response_data
    84→      );
    85→
    86→      if (telegramSuccess) {
    87→        console.log('[Form Submit] Telegram notification sent successfully');
    88→      } else {
    89→        console.warn('[Form Submit] Telegram notification failed (returned false)');
    90→      }
    91→    } catch (err) {
    92→      console.error('[Form Submit] Exception while sending Telegram notification:', err);
    93→      // Don't fail the request if Telegram notification fails
    94→    }
    95→
    96→    return NextResponse.json(
    97→      { success: true, data: response },
    98→      { status: 200 }
    99→    );
   100→  } catch (error) {
   101→    console.error('Error in form submission API:', error);
   102→    return NextResponse.json(
   103→      { error: 'Internal server error' },
   104→      { status: 500 }
   105→    );
   106→  }
   107→}
   108→
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./lib/formService.ts`

```text
     1→import { supabase } from './supabase';
     2→import { generateUniqueSlug } from './slugUtils';
     3→
     4→// TypeScript types for Forms
     5→export type FormStatus = 'draft' | 'published' | 'closed';
     6→export type FieldType = 'text' | 'textarea' | 'email' | 'number' | 'select' | 'radio' | 'checkbox' | 'date' | 'section' | 'description';
     7→
     8→export interface Form {
     9→  id: string;
    10→  user_id: string;
    11→  name: string;
    12→  slug: string | null;
    13→  description: string | null;
    14→  status: FormStatus;
    15→  subdomain_enabled: boolean | null;
    16→  subdomain_url: string | null;
    17→  created_at: string;
    18→  updated_at: string;
    19→}
    20→
    21→export interface FormField {
    22→  id: string;
    23→  form_id: string;
    24→  field_type: FieldType;
    25→  label: string;
    26→  required: boolean;
    27→  options: string[] | null; // For select/radio/checkbox
    28→  allow_multiple: boolean | null; // Allow multiple answers
    29→  include_other: boolean | null; // Include "Other" option for select fields
    30→  allow_attachments: boolean | null; // Allow file attachments for text/textarea fields
    31→  is_yes_no_dropdown: boolean | null; // For select fields, indicates this is a Yes/No dropdown
    32→  require_yes_reason: boolean | null; // Require reason input when "Yes" is selected
    33→  require_no_reason: boolean | null; // Require reason input when "No" is selected
    34→  display_order: number;
    35→  page_number: number;
    36→  created_at: string;
    37→}
    38→
    39→export interface FormResponse {
    40→  id: string;
    41→  form_id: string;
    42→  response_data: Record<string, any>; // { field_id: value }
    43→  submitted_by_email: string | null;
    44→  submitted_by_name: string | null;
    45→  submitted_at: string;
    46→}
    47→
    48→export interface FormWithFields extends Form {
    49→  fields: FormField[];
    50→}
    51→
    52→export interface FormWithStats extends Form {
    53→  response_count: number;
    54→}
    55→
    56→export interface CreateFormData {
    57→  name: string;
    58→  slug?: string;
    59→  description?: string;
    60→  status?: FormStatus;
    61→}
    62→
    63→export interface UpdateFormData {
    64→  id: string;
    65→  name?: string;
    66→  slug?: string | null;
    67→  description?: string | null;
    68→  status?: FormStatus;
    69→  subdomain_enabled?: boolean | null;
    70→  subdomain_url?: string | null;
    71→}
    72→
    73→export interface CreateFieldData {
    74→  form_id: string;
    75→  field_type: FieldType;
    76→  label: string;
    77→  required?: boolean;
    78→  options?: string[];
    79→  allow_multiple?: boolean;
    80→  include_other?: boolean;
    81→  allow_attachments?: boolean;
    82→  is_yes_no_dropdown?: boolean;
    83→  require_yes_reason?: boolean;
    84→  require_no_reason?: boolean;
    85→  display_order?: number;
    86→  page_number?: number;
    87→}
    88→
    89→export interface UpdateFieldData {
    90→  id: string;
    91→  field_type?: FieldType;
    92→  label?: string;
    93→  required?: boolean;
    94→  options?: string[] | null;
    95→  allow_multiple?: boolean | null;
    96→  include_other?: boolean | null;
    97→  allow_attachments?: boolean | null;
    98→  is_yes_no_dropdown?: boolean | null;
    99→  require_yes_reason?: boolean | null;
   100→  require_no_reason?: boolean | null;
   101→  display_order?: number;
   102→  page_number?: number;
   103→}
   104→
   105→export interface SubmitResponseData {
   106→  form_id: string;
   107→  response_data: Record<string, any>;
   108→  submitted_by_email?: string;
   109→  submitted_by_name?: string;
   110→}
   111→
   112→export class FormService {
   113→  /**
   114→   * Get all forms for the current user with response counts
   115→   */
   116→  static async getAllForms(): Promise<FormWithStats[]> {
   117→    try {
   118→      const { data: forms, error } = await (supabase as any)
   119→        .from('forms')
   120→        .select(`
   121→          *,
   122→          response_count:form_responses(count)
   123→        `)
   124→        .is('archived_at', null)
   125→        .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
   126→
   127→      if (error) throw error;
   128→
   129→      // Transform the response count
   130→      return (forms || []).map((form: any) => ({
   131→        ...form,
   132→        response_count: form.response_count?.[0]?.count || 0
   133→      }));
   134→    } catch (error) {
   135→      console.error('Error fetching forms:', error);
   136→      throw error;
   137→    }
   138→  }
   139→
   140→  /**
   141→   * Get a single form by ID with fields
   142→   */
   143→  static async getFormById(formId: string): Promise<FormWithFields | null> {
   144→    try {
   145→      const { data: form, error: formError } = await (supabase as any)
   146→        .from('forms')
   147→        .select('*')
   148→        .eq('id', formId)
   149→        .single();
   150→
   151→      if (formError) throw formError;
   152→      if (!form) return null;
   153→
   154→      const { data: fields, error: fieldsError } = await (supabase as any)
   155→        .from('form_fields')
   156→        .select('*')
   157→        .eq('form_id', formId)
   158→        .order('page_number', { ascending: true })
   159→        .order('display_order', { ascending: true });
   160→
   161→      if (fieldsError) throw fieldsError;
   162→
   163→      return {
   164→        ...form,
   165→        fields: fields || []
   166→      };
   167→    } catch (error) {
   168→      console.error('Error fetching form:', error);
   169→      throw error;
   170→    }
   171→  }
   172→
   173→  /**
   174→   * Get a single form by slug with fields
   175→   */
   176→  static async getFormBySlug(slug: string): Promise<FormWithFields | null> {
   177→    try {
   178→      const { data: form, error: formError } = await (supabase as any)
   179→        .from('forms')
   180→        .select('*')
   181→        .eq('slug', slug)
   182→        .single();
   183→
   184→      if (formError) throw formError;
   185→      if (!form) return null;
   186→
   187→      const { data: fields, error: fieldsError } = await (supabase as any)
   188→        .from('form_fields')
   189→        .select('*')
   190→        .eq('form_id', form.id)
   191→        .order('page_number', { ascending: true })
   192→        .order('display_order', { ascending: true });
   193→
   194→      if (fieldsError) throw fieldsError;
   195→
   196→      return {
   197→        ...form,
   198→        fields: fields || []
   199→      };
   200→    } catch (error) {
   201→      console.error('Error fetching form by slug:', error);
   202→      throw error;
   203→    }
   204→  }
   205→
   206→  /**
   207→   * Get a form by ID or slug with fields
   208→   */
   209→  static async getFormByIdOrSlug(idOrSlug: string): Promise<FormWithFields | null> {
   210→    // Check if it's a UUID format
   211→    const isUUID = /^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$/i.test(idOrSlug);
   212→
   213→    if (isUUID) {
   214→      return this.getFormById(idOrSlug);
   215→    } else {
   216→      return this.getFormBySlug(idOrSlug);
   217→    }
   218→  }
   219→
   220→  /**
   221→   * Get a published form by ID or slug (public access, no auth required)
   222→   * Use the public supabase client for this
   223→   */
   224→  static async getPublicForm(idOrSlug: string, publicSupabase: any): Promise<FormWithFields | null> {
   225→    try {
   226→      // Check if it's a UUID format
   227→      const isUUID = /^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$/i.test(idOrSlug);
   228→
   229→      let query = publicSupabase
   230→        .from('forms')
   231→        .select('*')
   232→        .eq('status', 'published');
   233→
   234→      if (isUUID) {
   235→        query = query.eq('id', idOrSlug);
   236→      } else {
   237→        query = query.eq('slug', idOrSlug);
   238→      }
   239→
   240→      const { data: form, error: formError } = await query.single();
   241→
   242→      if (formError) throw formError;
   243→      if (!form) return null;
   244→
   245→      const { data: fields, error: fieldsError } = await publicSupabase
   246→        .from('form_fields')
   247→        .select('*')
   248→        .eq('form_id', form.id)
   249→        .order('page_number', { ascending: true })
   250→        .order('display_order', { ascending: true });
   251→
   252→      if (fieldsError) throw fieldsError;
   253→
   254→      return {
   255→        ...form,
   256→        fields: fields || []
   257→      };
   258→    } catch (error) {
   259→      console.error('Error fetching public form:', error);
   260→      return null;
   261→    }
   262→  }
   263→
   264→  /**
   265→   * Create a new form
   266→   */
   267→  static async createForm(formData: CreateFormData): Promise<Form> {
   268→    try {
   269→      const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
   270→      if (!user) throw new Error('Not authenticated');
   271→
   272→      // Generate slug if not provided
   273→      const slug = formData.slug || generateUniqueSlug(formData.name);
   274→
   275→      const { data: form, error } = await (supabase as any)
   276→        .from('forms')
   277→        .insert([{
   278→          user_id: user.id,
   279→          name: formData.name,
   280→          slug: slug,
   281→          description: formData.description || null,
   282→          status: formData.status || 'draft'
   283→        }])
   284→        .select()
   285→        .single();
   286→
   287→      if (error) throw error;
   288→      return form;
   289→    } catch (error) {
   290→      console.error('Error creating form:', error);
   291→      throw error;
   292→    }
   293→  }
   294→
   295→  /**
   296→   * Update a form
   297→   */
   298→  static async updateForm(formData: UpdateFormData): Promise<Form> {
   299→    try {
   300→      const updateData: any = { ...formData };
   301→      delete updateData.id;
   302→
   303→      const { data: form, error } = await (supabase as any)
   304→        .from('forms')
   305→        .update(updateData)
   306→        .eq('id', formData.id)
   307→        .select()
   308→        .single();
   309→
   310→      if (error) throw error;
   311→      return form;
   312→    } catch (error) {
   313→      console.error('Error updating form:', error);
   314→      throw error;
   315→    }
   316→  }
   317→
   318→  /**
   319→   * Archive a form (soft delete)
   320→   */
   321→  static async archiveForm(formId: string): Promise<void> {
   322→    try {
   323→      const { error } = await (supabase as any)
   324→        .from('forms')
   325→        .update({ archived_at: new Date().toISOString() })
   326→        .eq('id', formId);
   327→
   328→      if (error) throw error;
   329→    } catch (error) {
   330→      console.error('Error archiving form:', error);
   331→      throw error;
   332→    }
   333→  }
   334→
   335→  /**
   336→   * Delete a form permanently
   337→   */
   338→  static async deleteForm(formId: string): Promise<void> {
   339→    try {
   340→      const { error } = await (supabase as any)
   341→        .from('forms')
   342→        .delete()
   343→        .eq('id', formId);
   344→
   345→      if (error) throw error;
   346→    } catch (error) {
   347→      console.error('Error deleting form:', error);
   348→      throw error;
   349→    }
   350→  }
   351→
   352→  /**
   353→   * Create a new field for a form
   354→   */
   355→  static async createField(fieldData: CreateFieldData): Promise<FormField> {
   356→    try {
   357→      // Get the next display order
   358→      const { data: existingFields } = await (supabase as any)
   359→        .from('form_fields')
   360→        .select('display_order')
   361→        .eq('form_id', fieldData.form_id)
   362→        .order('display_order', { ascending: false })
   363→        .limit(1);
   364→
   365→      const nextOrder = existingFields?.[0]?.display_order + 1 || 0;
   366→
   367→      const { data: field, error } = await (supabase as any)
   368→        .from('form_fields')
   369→        .insert([{
   370→          form_id: fieldData.form_id,
   371→          field_type: fieldData.field_type,
   372→          label: fieldData.label,
   373→          required: fieldData.required || false,
   374→          options: fieldData.options || null,
   375→          display_order: fieldData.display_order ?? nextOrder,
   376→          page_number: fieldData.page_number ?? 1
   377→        }])
   378→        .select()
   379→        .single();
   380→
   381→      if (error) throw error;
   382→      return field;
   383→    } catch (error) {
   384→      console.error('Error creating field:', error);
   385→      throw error;
   386→    }
   387→  }
   388→
   389→  /**
   390→   * Update a field
   391→   */
   392→  static async updateField(fieldData: UpdateFieldData): Promise<FormField> {
   393→    try {
   394→      const updateData: any = { ...fieldData };
   395→      delete updateData.id;
   396→
   397→      const { data: field, error } = await (supabase as any)
   398→        .from('form_fields')
   399→        .update(updateData)
   400→        .eq('id', fieldData.id)
   401→        .select()
   402→        .single();
   403→
   404→      if (error) throw error;
   405→      return field;
   406→    } catch (error) {
   407→      console.error('Error updating field:', error);
   408→      throw error;
   409→    }
   410→  }
   411→
   412→  /**
   413→   * Delete a field
   414→   */
   415→  static async deleteField(fieldId: string): Promise<void> {
   416→    try {
   417→      const { error } = await (supabase as any)
   418→        .from('form_fields')
   419→        .delete()
   420→        .eq('id', fieldId);
   421→
   422→      if (error) throw error;
   423→    } catch (error) {
   424→      console.error('Error deleting field:', error);
   425→      throw error;
   426→    }
   427→  }
   428→
   429→  /**
   430→   * Reorder fields for a form
   431→   */
   432→  static async reorderFields(formId: string, fieldIds: string[]): Promise<void> {
   433→    try {
   434→      // Update each field's display_order
   435→      const updates = fieldIds.map((fieldId, index) =>
   436→        (supabase as any)
   437→          .from('form_fields')
   438→          .update({ display_order: index })
   439→          .eq('id', fieldId)
   440→          .eq('form_id', formId)
   441→      );
   442→
   443→      await Promise.all(updates);
   444→    } catch (error) {
   445→      console.error('Error reordering fields:', error);
   446→      throw error;
   447→    }
   448→  }
   449→
   450→  /**
   451→   * Submit a response to a form (public access)
   452→   */
   453→  static async submitResponse(responseData: SubmitResponseData, publicSupabase?: any): Promise<FormResponse> {
   454→    try {
   455→      // Use API route to submit form (bypasses RLS with service role)
   456→      const response = await fetch('/api/forms/submit', {
   457→        method: 'POST',
   458→        headers: {
   459→          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
   460→        },
   461→        body: JSON.stringify({
   462→          form_id: responseData.form_id,
   463→          response_data: responseData.response_data,
   464→          submitted_by_email: responseData.submitted_by_email || null,
   465→          submitted_by_name: responseData.submitted_by_name || null
   466→        }),
   467→      });
   468→
   469→      if (!response.ok) {
   470→        const errorData = await response.json();
   471→        throw new Error(errorData.error || 'Failed to submit form');
   472→      }
   473→
   474→      const { data } = await response.json();
   475→      return data;
   476→    } catch (error) {
   477→      console.error('Error submitting response:', error);
   478→      throw error;
   479→    }
   480→  }
   481→
   482→  /**
   483→   * Get all responses for a form
   484→   */
   485→  static async getResponses(formId: string): Promise<FormResponse[]> {
   486→    try {
   487→      const { data: responses, error } = await (supabase as any)
   488→        .from('form_responses')
   489→        .select('*')
   490→        .eq('form_id', formId)
   491→        .order('submitted_at', { ascending: false });
   492→
   493→      if (error) throw error;
   494→      return responses || [];
   495→    } catch (error) {
   496→      console.error('Error fetching responses:', error);
   497→      throw error;
   498→    }
   499→  }
   500→
   501→  /**
   502→   * Delete a response
   503→   */
   504→  static async deleteResponse(responseId: string): Promise<void> {
   505→    try {
   506→      const { error } = await (supabase as any)
   507→        .from('form_responses')
   508→        .delete()
   509→        .eq('id', responseId);
   510→
   511→      if (error) throw error;
   512→    } catch (error) {
   513→      console.error('Error deleting response:', error);
   514→      throw error;
   515→    }
   516→  }
   517→
   518→  /**
   519→   * Export responses to CSV format
   520→   */
   521→  static async exportResponsesToCSV(formId: string): Promise<string> {
   522→    try {
   523→      // Get form with fields
   524→      const form = await this.getFormById(formId);
   525→      if (!form) throw new Error('Form not found');
   526→
   527→      // Get responses
   528→      const responses = await this.getResponses(formId);
   529→
   530→      // Build CSV header
   531→      const headers = [
   532→        'Submission Date',
   533→        'Submitted By Name',
   534→        'Submitted By Email',
   535→        ...form.fields.map(f => f.label)
   536→      ];
   537→
   538→      // Build CSV rows
   539→      const rows = responses.map(response => {
   540→        const row = [
   541→          new Date(response.submitted_at).toLocaleString(),
   542→          response.submitted_by_name || '',
   543→          response.submitted_by_email || '',
   544→          ...form.fields.map(field => {
   545→            const value = response.response_data[field.id];
   546→            if (Array.isArray(value)) {
   547→              return value.join(', ');
   548→            }
   549→            return value || '';
   550→          })
   551→        ];
   552→        return row.map(cell => `"${String(cell).replace(/"/g, '""')}"`).join(',');
   553→      });
   554→
   555→      // Combine header and rows
   556→      const csv = [
   557→        headers.map(h => `"${h}"`).join(','),
   558→        ...rows
   559→      ].join('\n');
   560→
   561→      return csv;
   562→    } catch (error) {
   563→      console.error('Error exporting responses:', error);
   564→      throw error;
   565→    }
   566→  }
   567→
   568→  /**
   569→   * Get field type icon
   570→   */
   571→  static getFieldTypeIcon(fieldType: FieldType): string {
   572→    const icons: Record<FieldType, string> = {
   573→      text: '📝',
   574→      textarea: '📄',
   575→      email: '📧',
   576→      number: '🔢',
   577→      select: '📋',
   578→      radio: '🔘',
   579→      checkbox: '☑️',
   580→      date: '📅',
   581→      section: '📑',
   582→      description: '💬'
   583→    };
   584→    return icons[fieldType] || '❓';
   585→  }
   586→
   587→  /**
   588→   * Get field type label
   589→   */
   590→  static getFieldTypeLabel(fieldType: FieldType): string {
   591→    const labels: Record<FieldType, string> = {
   592→      text: 'Short Text',
   593→      textarea: 'Long Text',
   594→      email: 'Email',
   595→      number: 'Number',
   596→      select: 'Dropdown',
   597→      radio: 'Multiple Choice',
   598→      checkbox: 'Checkboxes',
   599→      date: 'Date',
   600→      section: 'Section Header',
   601→      description: 'Description Text'
   602→    };
   603→    return labels[fieldType] || fieldType;
   604→  }
   605→
   606→  /**
   607→   * Get status badge color
   608→   */
   609→  static getStatusColor(status: FormStatus): string {
   610→    const colors: Record<FormStatus, string> = {
   611→      draft: 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700',
   612→      published: 'bg-green-100 text-green-700',
   613→      closed: 'bg-red-100 text-red-700'
   614→    };
   615→    return colors[status] || 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700';
   616→  }
   617→
   618→  /**
   619→   * Bulk update field positions (for drag and drop reordering)
   620→   */
   621→  static async updateFieldPositions(updates: Array<{ id: string; display_order: number; page_number: number }>): Promise<void> {
   622→    try {
   623→      // Update each field
   624→      const promises = updates.map(({ id, display_order, page_number }) =>
   625→        (supabase as any)
   626→          .from('form_fields')
   627→          .update({ display_order, page_number })
   628→          .eq('id', id)
   629→      );
   630→
   631→      await Promise.all(promises);
   632→    } catch (error) {
   633→      console.error('Error updating field positions:', error);
   634→      throw error;
   635→    }
   636→  }
   637→}
   638→
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-11 17:10:37Z)**_

Build passes. Here's what was done:

**Migration**: Added `client_id` (UUID FK to `clients`) column on `form_responses` with an index.

**Changes across 3 files**:
- **`lib/formService.ts`** — Added `client_id` to `FormResponse`, `SubmitResponseData`, and the submission payload
- **`app/api/forms/submit/route.ts`** — Extracts `client_id` from the request body and inserts it into the DB
- **`app/public/forms/[id]/page.tsx`** — Reads `?client=<clientId>` from the URL query params and passes it through on submit

**Usage**: When sending a form link to a client, append `?client=<clientId>` to the URL (e.g. `/public/forms/onboarding-form?client=abc-123`). The response will be linked to that client in the database.

---

```text
   165→   165→
   166→   166→  // Resolve slug to UUID on mount
   167→   167→  useEffect(() => {
   168→   168→    async function resolveClientId() {
   169→   169→      try {
   170→   170→        if (isUUID(idOrSlug)) {
   171→   171→          setClientId(idOrSlug);
   172→   172→          // Fetch client email
   173→   173→          const { data, error } = await supabasePublic
   174→   174→            .from('clients')
   175→   175→            .select('id, name, email, slug, logo_url')
   176→   176→            .eq('id', idOrSlug)
   177→   177→            .is('archived_at', null)
   178→   178→            .single();
   179→   179→
   180→   180→          if (error || !data) {
   181→   181→            setError('Client not found');
   182→   182→            setLoadingClientEmail(false);
   183→   183→            return;
   184→   184→          }
   185→   185→          setClient(data);
   186→   186→          setClientEmail(data.email);
   187→   187→        } else {
   188→   188→          // Fetch by slug
   189→   189→          const { data, error } = await supabasePublic
   190→   190→            .from('clients')
   191→   191→            .select('id, name, email, slug, logo_url')
   192→   192→            .eq('slug', idOrSlug)
   193→   193→            .is('archived_at', null)
   194→   194→            .single();
   195→   195→
   196→   196→          if (error || !data) {
   197→   197→            setError('Client not found');
   198→   198→            setLoadingClientEmail(false);
   199→   199→            return;
   200→   200→          }
   201→   201→          setClientId(data.id);
   202→   202→          setClient(data);
   203→   203→          setClientEmail(data.email);

   205→   205→      } catch (err) {
```

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-11 17:28:33Z)**_

Done. When a client visits their portal:

- It checks if they have a submitted response to the "Holo Hive Onboarding" form (via the `client_id` on `form_responses`)
- If **no response exists**, a banner appears below the welcome section: "Complete Your Onboarding" with a "Fill Out Form" button that opens the onboarding form with their `client_id` pre-linked
- If they've already submitted it (or the form doesn't exist), the banner is hidden

---

```text
  2935→                {/* Form Fields */}
  2936→                <div className="space-y-4">
  2937→                  {form?.fields
  2938→                    .sort((a, b) => (a.page_number - b.page_number) || (a.display_order - b.display_order))
  2939→                    .map((field) => {

  2944→                      const attachments = selectedResponse.response_data[attachmentsKey];
  2945→
  2946→                      // Skip display-only fields that don't collect responses

  2948→                      const isDisplayOnly = displayOnlyTypes.includes(field.field_type);
  2949→
  2950→                      return (
  2951→                        <div key={field.id} className="bg-white p-4 rounded-lg border border-gray-200">
  2952→                          <div className="mb-3 flex items-start gap-1">
  2953→                            <div
  2954→                              className="text-sm text-gray-900 flex-1"
  2955→                              dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: field.label }}
  2956→                            />
  2957→                            {field.required && !isDisplayOnly && <span className="text-red-500">*</span>}
  2958→                          </div>
  2959→
  2960→                          {/* Value Display - Only show for actual input fields */}
  2961→                          {!isDisplayOnly && (
  2962→                            <div className="text-sm text-gray-900 mt-2">
  2963→                              {/* Show the main field value */}
  2964→                              {field.field_type === 'yes_no' ? (
  2965→                                <div>
  2966→                                  <span className={`inline-flex items-center px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-sm font-medium ${
  2967→                                    value === 'Yes'
  2968→                                      ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-800'
  2969→                                      : value === 'No'
  2970→                                      ? 'bg-red-100 text-red-800'
  2971→                                      : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-800'
  2972→                                  }`}>
  2973→                                    {value || '-'}
  2974→                                  </span>
  2975→                                  {reason && (
  2976→                                    <div className="mt-2 pl-4 border-l-2 border-gray-300">
  2977→                                      <Label className="text-xs text-gray-600">Reason:</Label>
  2978→                                      <p className="text-sm text-gray-900 mt-1">{reason}</p>
  2979→                                    </div>
  2980→                                  )}
  2981→                                </div>
  2982→                              ) : Array.isArray(value) ? (
  2983→                                <div className="space-y-1">

  2988→                                        <span className="text-gray-900">{item}</span>
  2989→                                      </div>
  2990→                                    ))
  2991→                                  ) : (
  2992→                                    <span className="text-gray-400 italic">No selection</span>
  2993→                                  )}
  2994→                                </div>
  2995→                              ) : field.field_type === 'long_text' ? (
  2996→                                <p className="whitespace-pre-wrap bg-gray-50 p-3 rounded border border-gray-200">

  2999→                              ) : (
```

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-11 17:45:34Z)**_

There's no UPDATE policy on `form_responses` — only INSERT, SELECT, and DELETE. The `linkResponseToClient` update call is silently failing due to RLS.

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-11 17:45:40Z)**_

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-11 17:45:46Z)**_

That was it — there was no RLS UPDATE policy on `form_responses`, so the `client_id` update was being silently blocked. Linking should work now.
