```text
     1→import { supabase } from './supabase';
     2→import { generateUniqueSlug } from './slugUtils';
     3→
     4→// TypeScript types for Forms
     5→export type FormStatus = 'draft' | 'published' | 'closed';
     6→export type FieldType = 'text' | 'textarea' | 'email' | 'number' | 'select' | 'radio' | 'checkbox' | 'date' | 'section' | 'description';
     7→
     8→export interface Form {
     9→  id: string;
    10→  user_id: string;
    11→  name: string;
    12→  slug: string | null;
    13→  description: string | null;
    14→  status: FormStatus;
    15→  subdomain_enabled: boolean | null;
    16→  subdomain_url: string | null;
    17→  created_at: string;
    18→  updated_at: string;
    19→}
    20→
    21→export interface FormField {
    22→  id: string;
    23→  form_id: string;
    24→  field_type: FieldType;
    25→  label: string;
    26→  required: boolean;
    27→  options: string[] | null; // For select/radio/checkbox
    28→  allow_multiple: boolean | null; // Allow multiple answers
    29→  include_other: boolean | null; // Include "Other" option for select fields
    30→  allow_attachments: boolean | null; // Allow file attachments for text/textarea fields
    31→  is_yes_no_dropdown: boolean | null; // For select fields, indicates this is a Yes/No dropdown
    32→  require_yes_reason: boolean | null; // Require reason input when "Yes" is selected
    33→  require_no_reason: boolean | null; // Require reason input when "No" is selected
    34→  display_order: number;
    35→  page_number: number;
    36→  created_at: string;
    37→}
    38→
    39→export interface FormResponse {
    40→  id: string;
    41→  form_id: string;
    42→  response_data: Record<string, any>; // { field_id: value }
    43→  submitted_by_email: string | null;
    44→  submitted_by_name: string | null;
    45→  client_id: string | null;
    46→  client_name?: string | null;
    47→  submitted_at: string;
    48→}
    49→
    50→export interface FormWithFields extends Form {
    51→  fields: FormField[];
    52→}
    53→
    54→export interface FormWithStats extends Form {
    55→  response_count: number;
    56→}
    57→
    58→export interface CreateFormData {
    59→  name: string;
    60→  slug?: string;
    61→  description?: string;

    63→}
    64→

    76→  form_id: string;
    77→  field_type: FieldType;
    78→  label: string;
    79→  required?: boolean;
    80→  options?: string[];
    81→  allow_multiple?: boolean;
    82→  include_other?: boolean;

    90→
    91→export interface UpdateFieldData {
    92→  id: string;
    93→  field_type?: FieldType;
    94→  label?: string;
    95→  required?: boolean;
    96→  options?: string[] | null;
    97→  allow_multiple?: boolean | null;
    98→  include_other?: boolean | null;
    99→  allow_attachments?: boolean | null;
   100→  is_yes_no_dropdown?: boolean | null;
   101→  require_yes_reason?: boolean | null;
   102→  require_no_reason?: boolean | null;
   103→  display_order?: number;
   104→  page_number?: number;
   105→}
   106→
   107→export interface SubmitResponseData {
   108→  form_id: string;
   109→  response_data: Record<string, any>;
   110→  submitted_by_email?: string;
   111→  submitted_by_name?: string;
   112→  client_id?: string;
   113→}
   114→
   115→export class FormService {
   116→  /**
   117→   * Get all forms for the current user with response counts
   118→   */
   119→  static async getAllForms(): Promise<FormWithStats[]> {
   120→    try {
   121→      const { data: forms, error } = await (supabase as any)
   122→        .from('forms')
   123→        .select(`
   124→          *,
   125→          response_count:form_responses(count)
   126→        `)
   127→        .is('archived_at', null)
   128→        .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
   129→
   130→      if (error) throw error;
   131→
   132→      // Transform the response count
   133→      return (forms || []).map((form: any) => ({
   134→        ...form,
   135→        response_count: form.response_count?.[0]?.count || 0
   136→      }));
   137→    } catch (error) {
   138→      console.error('Error fetching forms:', error);
   139→      throw error;
   140→    }
   141→  }
   142→
   143→  /**
   144→   * Get a single form by ID with fields
   145→   */
   146→  static async getFormById(formId: string): Promise<FormWithFields | null> {
   147→    try {
   148→      const { data: form, error: formError } = await (supabase as any)
   149→        .from('forms')
   150→        .select('*')
   151→        .eq('id', formId)
   152→        .single();
   153→
   154→      if (formError) throw formError;
   155→      if (!form) return null;
   156→
   157→      const { data: fields, error: fieldsError } = await (supabase as any)
   158→        .from('form_fields')
   159→        .select('*')
   160→        .eq('form_id', formId)
   161→        .order('page_number', { ascending: true })
   162→        .order('display_order', { ascending: true });
   163→
   164→      if (fieldsError) throw fieldsError;
   165→
   166→      return {
   167→        ...form,
   168→        fields: fields || []
   169→      };
   170→    } catch (error) {
   171→      console.error('Error fetching form:', error);
   172→      throw error;
   173→    }
   174→  }
   175→
   176→  /**
   177→   * Get a single form by slug with fields
   178→   */
   179→  static async getFormBySlug(slug: string): Promise<FormWithFields | null> {
   180→    try {
   181→      const { data: form, error: formError } = await (supabase as any)
   182→        .from('forms')
   183→        .select('*')
   184→        .eq('slug', slug)
   185→        .single();
   186→
   187→      if (formError) throw formError;
   188→      if (!form) return null;
   189→
   190→      const { data: fields, error: fieldsError } = await (supabase as any)
   191→        .from('form_fields')
   192→        .select('*')
   193→        .eq('form_id', form.id)
   194→        .order('page_number', { ascending: true })
   195→        .order('display_order', { ascending: true });
   196→
   197→      if (fieldsError) throw fieldsError;
   198→
   199→      return {
   200→        ...form,
   201→        fields: fields || []
   202→      };
   203→    } catch (error) {
   204→      console.error('Error fetching form by slug:', error);
   205→      throw error;
   206→    }
   207→  }
   208→
   209→  /**
   210→   * Get a form by ID or slug with fields
   211→   */
   212→  static async getFormByIdOrSlug(idOrSlug: string): Promise<FormWithFields | null> {
   213→    // Check if it's a UUID format
   214→    const isUUID = /^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$/i.test(idOrSlug);
   215→
   216→    if (isUUID) {
   217→      return this.getFormById(idOrSlug);
   218→    } else {
   219→      return this.getFormBySlug(idOrSlug);
   220→    }
   221→  }
   222→
   223→  /**
   224→   * Get a published form by ID or slug (public access, no auth required)
   225→   * Use the public supabase client for this
   226→   */
   227→  static async getPublicForm(idOrSlug: string, publicSupabase: any): Promise<FormWithFields | null> {
   228→    try {
   229→      // Check if it's a UUID format
   230→      const isUUID = /^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$/i.test(idOrSlug);
   231→
   232→      let query = publicSupabase
   233→        .from('forms')
   234→        .select('*')
   235→        .eq('status', 'published');
   236→
   237→      if (isUUID) {
   238→        query = query.eq('id', idOrSlug);
   239→      } else {
   240→        query = query.eq('slug', idOrSlug);
   241→      }
   242→
   243→      const { data: form, error: formError } = await query.single();
   244→
   245→      if (formError) throw formError;
   246→      if (!form) return null;
   247→
   248→      const { data: fields, error: fieldsError } = await publicSupabase
   249→        .from('form_fields')
   250→        .select('*')
   251→        .eq('form_id', form.id)
   252→        .order('page_number', { ascending: true })
   253→        .order('display_order', { ascending: true });
   254→
   255→      if (fieldsError) throw fieldsError;
   256→
   257→      return {
   258→        ...form,
   259→        fields: fields || []
   260→      };
   261→    } catch (error) {
   262→      console.error('Error fetching public form:', error);
   263→      return null;
   264→    }
   265→  }
   266→
   267→  /**
   268→   * Create a new form
   269→   */
   270→  static async createForm(formData: CreateFormData): Promise<Form> {
   271→    try {
   272→      const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
   273→      if (!user) throw new Error('Not authenticated');
   274→
   275→      // Generate slug if not provided
   276→      const slug = formData.slug || generateUniqueSlug(formData.name);
   277→
   278→      const { data: form, error } = await (supabase as any)
   279→        .from('forms')
   280→        .insert([{
   281→          user_id: user.id,
   282→          name: formData.name,
   283→          slug: slug,
   284→          description: formData.description || null,
   285→          status: formData.status || 'draft'
   286→        }])
   287→        .select()
   288→        .single();
   289→
   290→      if (error) throw error;
   291→      return form;
   292→    } catch (error) {
   293→      console.error('Error creating form:', error);
   294→      throw error;
   295→    }
   296→  }
   297→
   298→  /**
   299→   * Update a form
   300→   */
   301→  static async updateForm(formData: UpdateFormData): Promise<Form> {
   302→    try {
   303→      const updateData: any = { ...formData };
   304→      delete updateData.id;
   305→
   306→      const { data: form, error } = await (supabase as any)
   307→        .from('forms')
   308→        .update(updateData)
   309→        .eq('id', formData.id)
   310→        .select()
   311→        .single();
   312→
   313→      if (error) throw error;
   314→      return form;
   315→    } catch (error) {
   316→      console.error('Error updating form:', error);
   317→      throw error;
   318→    }
   319→  }
   320→
   321→  /**
   322→   * Archive a form (soft delete)
   323→   */
   324→  static async archiveForm(formId: string): Promise<void> {
   325→    try {
   326→      const { error } = await (supabase as any)
   327→        .from('forms')
   328→        .update({ archived_at: new Date().toISOString() })
   329→        .eq('id', formId);
   330→
   331→      if (error) throw error;
   332→    } catch (error) {
   333→      console.error('Error archiving form:', error);
   334→      throw error;
   335→    }
   336→  }
   337→
   338→  /**
   339→   * Delete a form permanently
   340→   */
   341→  static async deleteForm(formId: string): Promise<void> {
   342→    try {
   343→      const { error } = await (supabase as any)
   344→        .from('forms')
   345→        .delete()
   346→        .eq('id', formId);
   347→
   348→      if (error) throw error;
   349→    } catch (error) {
   350→      console.error('Error deleting form:', error);
   351→      throw error;
   352→    }
   353→  }
   354→
   355→  /**
   356→   * Create a new field for a form
   357→   */
   358→  static async createField(fieldData: CreateFieldData): Promise<FormField> {
   359→    try {
   360→      // Get the next display order
   361→      const { data: existingFields } = await (supabase as any)
   362→        .from('form_fields')
   363→        .select('display_order')
   364→        .eq('form_id', fieldData.form_id)
   365→        .order('display_order', { ascending: false })
   366→        .limit(1);
   367→
   368→      const nextOrder = existingFields?.[0]?.display_order + 1 || 0;
   369→
   370→      const { data: field, error } = await (supabase as any)
   371→        .from('form_fields')
   372→        .insert([{
   373→          form_id: fieldData.form_id,
   374→          field_type: fieldData.field_type,
   375→          label: fieldData.label,
   376→          required: fieldData.required || false,
   377→          options: fieldData.options || null,
   378→          display_order: fieldData.display_order ?? nextOrder,
   379→          page_number: fieldData.page_number ?? 1
   380→        }])
   381→        .select()
   382→        .single();
   383→
   384→      if (error) throw error;
   385→      return field;
   386→    } catch (error) {
   387→      console.error('Error creating field:', error);
   388→      throw error;
   389→    }
   390→  }
   391→
   392→  /**
   393→   * Update a field
   394→   */
   395→  static async updateField(fieldData: UpdateFieldData): Promise<FormField> {
   396→    try {
   397→      const updateData: any = { ...fieldData };
   398→      delete updateData.id;
   399→
   400→      const { data: field, error } = await (supabase as any)
   401→        .from('form_fields')
   402→        .update(updateData)
   403→        .eq('id', fieldData.id)
   404→        .select()
   405→        .single();
   406→
   407→      if (error) throw error;
   408→      return field;
   409→    } catch (error) {
   410→      console.error('Error updating field:', error);
   411→      throw error;
   412→    }
   413→  }
   414→
   415→  /**
   416→   * Delete a field
   417→   */
   418→  static async deleteField(fieldId: string): Promise<void> {
   419→    try {
   420→      const { error } = await (supabase as any)
   421→        .from('form_fields')
   422→        .delete()
   423→        .eq('id', fieldId);
   424→
   425→      if (error) throw error;
   426→    } catch (error) {
   427→      console.error('Error deleting field:', error);
   428→      throw error;
   429→    }
   430→  }
   431→
   432→  /**
   433→   * Reorder fields for a form
   434→   */
   435→  static async reorderFields(formId: string, fieldIds: string[]): Promise<void> {
   436→    try {
   437→      // Update each field's display_order
   438→      const updates = fieldIds.map((fieldId, index) =>
   439→        (supabase as any)
   440→          .from('form_fields')
   441→          .update({ display_order: index })
   442→          .eq('id', fieldId)
   443→          .eq('form_id', formId)
   444→      );
   445→
   446→      await Promise.all(updates);
   447→    } catch (error) {
   448→      console.error('Error reordering fields:', error);
   449→      throw error;
   450→    }
   451→  }
   452→
   453→  /**
   454→   * Submit a response to a form (public access)
   455→   */
   456→  static async submitResponse(responseData: SubmitResponseData, publicSupabase?: any): Promise<FormResponse> {
   457→    try {
   458→      // Use API route to submit form (bypasses RLS with service role)
   459→      const response = await fetch('/api/forms/submit', {
   460→        method: 'POST',
   461→        headers: {
   462→          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
   463→        },
   464→        body: JSON.stringify({
   465→          form_id: responseData.form_id,
   466→          response_data: responseData.response_data,
   467→          submitted_by_email: responseData.submitted_by_email || null,
   468→          submitted_by_name: responseData.submitted_by_name || null,
   469→          client_id: responseData.client_id || null
   470→        }),
   471→      });
   472→
   473→      if (!response.ok) {
   474→        const errorData = await response.json();
   475→        throw new Error(errorData.error || 'Failed to submit form');
   476→      }
   477→
   478→      const { data } = await response.json();
   479→      return data;
   480→    } catch (error) {
   481→      console.error('Error submitting response:', error);
   482→      throw error;
   483→    }
   484→  }
   485→
   486→  /**
   487→   * Get all responses for a form
   488→   */
   489→  static async getResponses(formId: string): Promise<FormResponse[]> {
   490→    try {
   491→      const { data: responses, error } = await (supabase as any)
   492→        .from('form_responses')
   493→        .select('*, client:clients!form_responses_client_id_fkey(name)')
   494→        .eq('form_id', formId)
   495→        .order('submitted_at', { ascending: false });
   496→
   497→      if (error) throw error;
   498→      return (responses || []).map((r: any) => ({
   499→        ...r,
   500→        client_name: r.client?.name || null,
   501→      }));
   502→    } catch (error) {
   503→      console.error('Error fetching responses:', error);
   504→      throw error;
   505→    }
   506→  }
   507→
   508→  /**
   509→   * Link a form response to a client
   510→   */
   511→  static async linkResponseToClient(responseId: string, clientId: string | null): Promise<void> {
   512→    try {
   513→      const { error } = await (supabase as any)
   514→        .from('form_responses')
   515→        .update({ client_id: clientId })
   516→        .eq('id', responseId);
   517→
   518→      if (error) throw error;
   519→    } catch (error) {
   520→      console.error('Error linking response to client:', error);
   521→      throw error;
   522→    }
   523→  }
   524→
   525→  /**
   526→   * Delete a response
   527→   */
   528→  static async deleteResponse(responseId: string): Promise<void> {
   529→    try {
   530→      const { error } = await (supabase as any)
   531→        .from('form_responses')
   532→        .delete()
   533→        .eq('id', responseId);
   534→
   535→      if (error) throw error;
   536→    } catch (error) {
   537→      console.error('Error deleting response:', error);
   538→      throw error;
   539→    }
   540→  }
   541→
   542→  /**
   543→   * Export responses to CSV format
   544→   */
   545→  static async exportResponsesToCSV(formId: string): Promise<string> {
   546→    try {
   547→      // Get form with fields
   548→      const form = await this.getFormById(formId);
   549→      if (!form) throw new Error('Form not found');
   550→
   551→      // Get responses
   552→      const responses = await this.getResponses(formId);
   553→
   554→      // Build CSV header
   555→      const headers = [
   556→        'Submission Date',
   557→        'Submitted By Name',
   558→        'Submitted By Email',
   559→        ...form.fields.map(f => f.label)
   560→      ];
   561→
   562→      // Build CSV rows
   563→      const rows = responses.map(response => {
   564→        const row = [
   565→          new Date(response.submitted_at).toLocaleString(),
   566→          response.submitted_by_name || '',
   567→          response.submitted_by_email || '',
   568→          ...form.fields.map(field => {
   569→            const value = response.response_data[field.id];
   570→            if (Array.isArray(value)) {
   571→              return value.join(', ');
   572→            }
   573→            return value || '';
   574→          })
   575→        ];
   576→        return row.map(cell => `"${String(cell).replace(/"/g, '""')}"`).join(',');
   577→      });
   578→
   579→      // Combine header and rows
   580→      const csv = [
   581→        headers.map(h => `"${h}"`).join(','),
   582→        ...rows
   583→      ].join('\n');
   584→
   585→      return csv;
   586→    } catch (error) {
   587→      console.error('Error exporting responses:', error);
   588→      throw error;
   589→    }
   590→  }
   591→
   592→  /**
   593→   * Get field type icon
   594→   */
   595→  static getFieldTypeIcon(fieldType: FieldType): string {
   596→    const icons: Record<FieldType, string> = {
   597→      text: '📝',
   598→      textarea: '📄',
   599→      email: '📧',
   600→      number: '🔢',
   601→      select: '📋',
   602→      radio: '🔘',
   603→      checkbox: '☑️',
   604→      date: '📅',
   605→      section: '📑',
   606→      description: '💬'
   607→    };
   608→    return icons[fieldType] || '❓';
   609→  }
   610→
   611→  /**
   612→   * Get field type label
   613→   */
   614→  static getFieldTypeLabel(fieldType: FieldType): string {
   615→    const labels: Record<FieldType, string> = {
   616→      text: 'Short Text',
   617→      textarea: 'Long Text',
   618→      email: 'Email',
   619→      number: 'Number',
   620→      select: 'Dropdown',
   621→      radio: 'Multiple Choice',
   622→      checkbox: 'Checkboxes',
   623→      date: 'Date',
   624→      section: 'Section Header',
   625→      description: 'Description Text'
   626→    };
   627→    return labels[fieldType] || fieldType;
   628→  }
   629→
   630→  /**
   631→   * Get status badge color
   632→   */
   633→  static getStatusColor(status: FormStatus): string {
   634→    const colors: Record<FormStatus, string> = {
   635→      draft: 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700',
   636→      published: 'bg-green-100 text-green-700',
   637→      closed: 'bg-red-100 text-red-700'
   638→    };
   639→    return colors[status] || 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700';
   640→  }
   641→
   642→  /**
   643→   * Bulk update field positions (for drag and drop reordering)
   644→   */
   645→  static async updateFieldPositions(updates: Array<{ id: string; display_order: number; page_number: number }>): Promise<void> {
   646→    try {
   647→      // Update each field
   648→      const promises = updates.map(({ id, display_order, page_number }) =>
   649→        (supabase as any)
   650→          .from('form_fields')
   651→          .update({ display_order, page_number })
   652→          .eq('id', id)
   653→      );
   654→
   655→      await Promise.all(promises);
   656→    } catch (error) {
   657→      console.error('Error updating field positions:', error);
   658→      throw error;
   659→    }
   660→  }
   661→}
   662→
```

```text
     1→import { supabase } from './supabase';
     2→import { Database } from './database.types';
     3→import { generateUniqueSlug } from './slugUtils';
     4→
     5→type Client = Database['public']['Tables']['clients']['Row'];
     6→type ClientAccessMember = Database['public']['Tables']['client_access_members']['Row'];
     7→
     8→export interface ClientWithAccess extends Client {
     9→  member_count?: number;
    10→  campaign_count?: number;
    11→  whitelist_partner_name?: string;
    12→}
    13→
    14→export class ClientService {
    15→  /**
    16→   * Get clients based on user role
    17→   * - Admins: See all clients
    18→   * - Members: See only clients they have access to via client_access_members
    19→   */
    20→  static async getClientsForUser(userRole: 'super_admin' | 'admin' | 'member' | 'client', userId: string): Promise<ClientWithAccess[]> {
    21→    try {
    22→      if (userRole === 'admin' || userRole === 'super_admin') {
    23→        // Admins and super admins can see all non-archived clients
    24→        const { data: clients, error } = await supabase
    25→          .from('clients')
    26→          .select(`
    27→            *,
    28→            client_access_members(count),
    29→            campaigns!campaigns_client_id_fkey(count),
    30→            whitelist_partner:partners!clients_whitelist_partner_id_fkey(name)
    31→          `)
    32→          .is('archived_at', null)
    33→          .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
    34→
    35→        if (error) throw error;
    36→
    37→        return clients?.map(client => ({
    38→          ...client,
    39→          member_count: client.client_access_members?.[0]?.count || 0,
    40→          campaign_count: (client as any).campaigns?.[0]?.count || 0,
    41→          whitelist_partner_name: (client.whitelist_partner as any)?.name
    42→        })) || [];
    43→      } else {
    44→        // Members can only see non-archived clients they have access to
    45→        const { data: clientAccess, error } = await supabase
    46→          .from('client_access_members')
    47→          .select(`
    48→            clients!inner(
    49→              id,
    50→              name,
    51→              email,
    52→              location,
    53→              is_active,
    54→              archived_at,
    55→              created_at,
    56→              updated_at,
    57→              logo_url,
    58→              campaigns!campaigns_client_id_fkey(count),
    59→              whitelist_partner:partners!clients_whitelist_partner_id_fkey(name)
    60→            )
    61→          `)
    62→          .eq('user_id', userId);
    63→
    64→        if (error) throw error;
    65→
    66→        return clientAccess?.map(access => {
    67→          const client = (access as any).clients;
    68→          return {
    69→            ...client,
    70→            campaign_count: client.campaigns?.[0]?.count || 0,
    71→            whitelist_partner_name: (client.whitelist_partner as any)?.name
    72→          };
    73→        }).filter(c => c && !c.archived_at) || [];
    74→      }
    75→    } catch (error) {
    76→      console.error('Error fetching clients:', error);
    77→      throw error;
    78→    }
    79→  }
    80→
    81→  /**
    82→   * Get all non-archived clients (admin only)
    83→   */
    84→  static async getAllClients(): Promise<Client[]> {
    85→    try {
    86→      const { data, error } = await supabase
    87→        .from('clients')
    88→        .select('*')
    89→        .is('archived_at', null)
    90→        .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
    91→
    92→      if (error) throw error;
    93→      return data || [];
    94→    } catch (error) {
    95→      console.error('Error fetching all clients:', error);
    96→      throw error;
    97→    }
    98→  }
    99→
   100→  /**
   101→   * Create a new client
   102→   */
   103→  static async createClient(
   104→    name: string,
   105→    email: string,
   106→    location?: string,
   107→    source?: string,
   108→    onboarding_call_held?: boolean,
   109→    onboarding_call_date?: string | null,
   110→    is_whitelisted?: boolean,
   111→    whitelist_partner_id?: string | null
   112→  ): Promise<Client> {
   113→    try {
   114→      // Generate a unique slug from the client name
   115→      const slug = generateUniqueSlug(name);
   116→
   117→      const { data, error } = await supabase
   118→        .from('clients')
   119→        .insert({ name, email, location, source, onboarding_call_held, onboarding_call_date, is_whitelisted, whitelist_partner_id, slug })
   120→        .select()
   121→        .single();
   122→      if (error) throw error;
   123→      return data;
   124→    } catch (error) {
   125→      console.error('Error creating client:', error);
   126→      throw error;
   127→    }
   128→  }

   134→    try {
   135→      const { data, error } = await supabase

   207→
   208→  /**
   209→   * Get client by ID or slug (for portal access)
   210→   */
   211→  static async getClientByIdOrSlug(identifier: string): Promise<Client | null> {
   212→    try {
   213→      // Check if identifier is a UUID
   214→      const isUUID = /^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$/i.test(identifier);
   215→
   216→      const query = supabase
   217→        .from('clients')
   218→        .select('*')
   219→        .is('archived_at', null);
   220→
   221→      if (isUUID) {
   222→        query.eq('id', identifier);
   223→      } else {
   224→        query.eq('slug', identifier);
   225→      }
   226→
   227→      const { data, error } = await query.single();
   228→
   229→      if (error) {
   230→        if (error.code === 'PGRST116') return null; // Not found
   231→        throw error;
   232→      }
   233→      return data;
   234→    } catch (error) {
   235→      console.error('Error fetching client by ID or slug:', error);
   236→      throw error;
   237→    }
   238→  }
   239→
   240→  /**
   241→   * Get client with their campaigns for portal display
   242→   */
   243→  static async getClientWithCampaigns(clientId: string): Promise<{
   244→    client: Client;
   245→    campaigns: any[];
   246→  } | null> {
   247→    try {
   248→      // Get client
   249→      const { data: client, error: clientError } = await supabase
   250→        .from('clients')
   251→        .select('*')
   252→        .eq('id', clientId)
   253→        .is('archived_at', null)
   254→        .single();
   255→
   256→      if (clientError || !client) return null;
   257→
   258→      // Get campaigns for this client with KOL and content counts
   259→      const { data: campaigns, error: campaignsError } = await supabase
   260→        .from('campaigns')
   261→        .select(`
   262→          id,
   263→          name,
   264→          slug,
   265→          status,
   266→          total_budget,
   267→          start_date,
   268→          end_date,
   269→          region,
   270→          description,
   271→          share_report_publicly,
   272→          created_at,
   273→          campaign_kols(count),
   274→          contents(
   275→            impressions,
   276→            likes,
   277→            comments,
   278→            retweets,
   279→            bookmarks
   280→          )
   281→        `)
   282→        .eq('client_id', clientId)
   283→        .is('archived_at', null)
   284→        .order('start_date', { ascending: false });
   285→
   286→      if (campaignsError) throw campaignsError;
   287→
   288→      // Process campaigns to add aggregated metrics
   289→      const processedCampaigns = campaigns?.map(campaign => {
   290→        const contents = (campaign as any).contents || [];
   291→        const totalImpressions = contents.reduce((sum: number, c: any) => sum + (c.impressions || 0), 0);
   292→        const totalEngagement = contents.reduce((sum: number, c: any) =>
   293→          sum + (c.likes || 0) + (c.comments || 0) + (c.retweets || 0) + (c.bookmarks || 0), 0);
   294→
   295→        return {
   296→          ...campaign,
   297→          kol_count: (campaign as any).campaign_kols?.[0]?.count || 0,
   298→          content_count: contents.length,
   299→          total_impressions: totalImpressions,
   300→          total_engagement: totalEngagement,
   301→        };
   302→      }) || [];
   303→
   304→      return { client, campaigns: processedCampaigns };
   305→    } catch (error) {
   306→      console.error('Error fetching client with campaigns:', error);
   307→      throw error;
   308→    }
   309→  }
   310→}
```

```text
    19→// Create a standalone Supabase client for public access

    23→
    24→export default function PublicFormPage({ params }: { params: { id: string } }) {
    25→  const formId = params.id;
    26→  const searchParams = useSearchParams();
    27→  const clientId = searchParams.get('client');
    28→  const [form, setForm] = useState<FormWithFields | null>(null);
    29→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    30→  const [submitting, setSubmitting] = useState(false);
    31→  const [submitted, setSubmitted] = useState(false);
    32→  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
    33→
    34→  // Form data
    35→  const [formData, setFormData] = useState<Record<string, any>>({});
    36→  const [validationErrors, setValidationErrors] = useState<Record<string, string>>({});
    37→
    38→  // Multiple answer tracking - stores arrays of values for fields that allow multiple
    39→  const [multipleAnswers, setMultipleAnswers] = useState<Record<string, string[]>>({});
    40→
    41→  // Other field tracking - stores custom text for "Other" option
    42→  const [otherFieldValues, setOtherFieldValues] = useState<Record<string, string>>({});
    43→
    44→  // Track which fields have "Other" selected
    45→  const [otherFieldSelected, setOtherFieldSelected] = useState<Record<string, boolean>>({});
    46→
    47→  // Track uploaded files for fields with attachments
    48→  const [uploadedFiles, setUploadedFiles] = useState<Record<string, File[]>>({});
    49→  const [uploadingFiles, setUploadingFiles] = useState<Record<string, boolean>>({});
    50→
    51→  // Track reason values for Yes/No selections
    52→  const [yesNoReasons, setYesNoReasons] = useState<Record<string, string>>({});
    53→
    54→  // Page navigation
    55→  const [currentPage, setCurrentPage] = useState(1);
    56→  const [totalPages, setTotalPages] = useState(1);
    57→
    58→  // Date formatting helpers
    59→  const formatDate = (dateString: string) => {
    60→    if (!dateString) return '';
    61→    return new Date(dateString).toLocaleDateString();
    62→  };
    63→
    64→  const formatDateForInput = (date: Date | undefined) => {
    65→    if (!date) return "";
    66→    const year = date.getFullYear();
    67→    const month = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, "0");
    68→    const day = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, "0");
    69→    return `${year}-${month}-${day}`;
    70→  };
    71→
    72→  const parseDateFromInput = (dateString: string) => {
    73→    if (!dateString) return undefined;
    74→    const [year, month, day] = dateString.split("-");
    75→    return new Date(parseInt(year), parseInt(month) - 1, parseInt(day));
    76→  };
    77→
    78→  useEffect(() => {
    79→    fetchForm();
    80→  }, [formId]);
    81→
    82→  const fetchForm = async () => {
    83→    try {
    84→      setLoading(true);
    85→      const data = await FormService.getPublicForm(formId, supabasePublic);
    86→
    87→      if (!data) {
    88→        setError('Form not found or not published');
    89→        return;
    90→      }
    91→
    92→      if (data.status === 'closed') {
    93→        setError('This form is no longer accepting responses');
    94→        return;
    95→      }
    96→
    97→      setForm(data);
    98→
    99→      // Calculate total pages
   100→      const maxPage = data.fields.reduce((max, field) => Math.max(max, field.page_number), 1);
   101→      setTotalPages(maxPage);
   102→
   103→      // Initialize form data with empty values
   104→      const initialData: Record<string, any> = {};
   105→      data.fields.forEach(field => {
   106→        if (field.field_type === 'checkbox') {
   107→          initialData[field.id] = [];
   108→        } else {
   109→          initialData[field.id] = '';
   110→        }
   111→      });
   112→      setFormData(initialData);
   113→    } catch (error) {
   114→      console.error('Error fetching form:', error);
   115→      setError('Failed to load form');
   116→    } finally {
   117→      setLoading(false);
   118→    }
   119→  };
   120→
   121→  const validateCurrentPage = (): boolean => {
   122→    const errors: Record<string, string> = {};
   123→
   124→    if (!form) return false;
   125→
   126→    // Validate only fields on current page (skip section headers and descriptions)
   127→    const fieldsOnCurrentPage = form.fields.filter(f => f.page_number === currentPage && !['section', 'description'].includes(f.field_type));
   128→    fieldsOnCurrentPage.forEach(field => {
   129→      if (field.required) {
   130→        const value = formData[field.id];
   131→        if (!value || (Array.isArray(value) && value.length === 0)) {
   132→          errors[field.id] = 'This field is required';
   133→        }
   134→      }
   135→
   136→      // Validate email fields
   137→      if (field.field_type === 'email' && formData[field.id]) {
   138→        const emailRegex = /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/;
   139→        if (!emailRegex.test(formData[field.id])) {
   140→          errors[field.id] = 'Please enter a valid email address';
   141→        }
   142→      }
   143→    });
   144→
   145→    setValidationErrors(errors);
   146→    return Object.keys(errors).length === 0;
   147→  };
   148→
   149→  const handleNextPage = (e?: React.MouseEvent) => {
   150→    e?.preventDefault();
   151→    e?.stopPropagation();
   152→    if (validateCurrentPage()) {
   153→      setCurrentPage(prev => Math.min(prev + 1, totalPages));
   154→      setValidationErrors({});
   155→    }
   156→  };
   157→
   158→  const handlePreviousPage = (e?: React.MouseEvent) => {
   159→    e?.preventDefault();
   160→    e?.stopPropagation();
   161→    setCurrentPage(prev => Math.max(prev - 1, 1));
   162→    setValidationErrors({});
   163→  };
   164→
   165→  const validateForm = (): boolean => {
   166→    const errors: Record<string, string> = {};
   167→
   168→    if (!form) return false;
   169→
   170→    // Validate required fields (skip section headers and descriptions)
   171→    form.fields.filter(f => !['section', 'description'].includes(f.field_type)).forEach(field => {
   172→      if (field.required) {
   173→        const value = formData[field.id];
   174→        if (!value || (Array.isArray(value) && value.length === 0)) {
   175→          errors[field.id] = 'This field is required';
   176→        }
   177→      }
   178→
   179→      // Validate email fields
   180→      if (field.field_type === 'email' && formData[field.id]) {

   182→        if (!emailRegex.test(formData[field.id])) {
   183→          errors[field.id] = 'Please enter a valid email address';
   184→        }
   185→      }
   186→
   187→      // Validate Yes/No reason fields for select fields
   188→      if (field.field_type === 'select' && formData[field.id]) {
   189→        const selectedValue = formData[field.id].toLowerCase();
   190→        if (field.require_yes_reason && selectedValue === 'yes') {
   191→          if (!yesNoReasons[field.id] || yesNoReasons[field.id].trim() === '') {
   192→            errors[field.id] = 'Please provide a reason for selecting "Yes"';
   193→          }
   194→        }
   195→        if (field.require_no_reason && selectedValue === 'no') {
   196→          if (!yesNoReasons[field.id] || yesNoReasons[field.id].trim() === '') {
   197→            errors[field.id] = 'Please provide a reason for selecting "No"';
   198→          }
   199→        }
   200→      }
   201→    });
   202→
   203→    setValidationErrors(errors);
   204→    return Object.keys(errors).length === 0;
   205→  };
   206→
   207→  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
   208→    e.preventDefault();
   209→
   210→    if (!validateForm()) {
   211→      return;
   212→    }
   213→
   214→    try {
   215→      setSubmitting(true);
   216→
   217→      // Upload files to Supabase Storage
   218→      const responseDataWithFiles = { ...formData };

   220→      // Add Yes/No reasons to response data
   221→      for (const fieldId in yesNoReasons) {
   222→        if (yesNoReasons[fieldId]) {
   223→          responseDataWithFiles[`${fieldId}_reason`] = yesNoReasons[fieldId];
   224→        }
   225→      }
   226→
   227→      for (const fieldId in uploadedFiles) {
   228→        if (uploadedFiles[fieldId] && uploadedFiles[fieldId].length > 0) {
   229→          const fileUrls: string[] = [];
   230→
   231→          for (const file of uploadedFiles[fieldId]) {
   232→            const fileExt = file.name.split('.').pop();
   233→            const fileName = `${form!.id}/${fieldId}/${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).substring(7)}.${fileExt}`;
   234→
   235→            const { data, error } = await supabasePublic.storage
   236→              .from('form-attachments')
   237→              .upload(fileName, file);
   238→
   239→            if (error) {
   240→              console.error('Error uploading file:', error);
   241→              throw new Error(`Failed to upload ${file.name}`);
   242→            }
   243→
   244→            // Get public URL
   245→            const { data: urlData } = supabasePublic.storage
   246→              .from('form-attachments')
   247→              .getPublicUrl(fileName);
   248→
   249→            fileUrls.push(urlData.publicUrl);
   250→          }
   251→
   252→          // Store file URLs in response data
   253→          responseDataWithFiles[`${fieldId}_attachments`] = fileUrls;
   254→        }
   255→      }
   256→
   257→      await FormService.submitResponse(
   258→        {
   259→          form_id: form!.id,
   260→          response_data: responseDataWithFiles,
   261→          client_id: clientId || undefined,
   262→        },
   263→        supabasePublic
   264→      );
   265→
   266→      // If thank you page is enabled, navigate to last page instead of showing full-page success
   267→      if (form?.enable_thank_you_page) {
   268→        setCurrentPage(totalPages);
   269→      }
   270→      setSubmitted(true);
   271→    } catch (error) {
   272→      console.error('Error submitting form:', error);
   273→      setError('Failed to submit form. Please try again.');
   274→    } finally {
   275→      setSubmitting(false);
   276→    }
   277→  };
   278→
   279→  const handleFieldChange = (fieldId: string, value: any) => {
   280→    setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, [fieldId]: value }));
   281→    // Clear validation error when user starts typing
   282→    if (validationErrors[fieldId]) {
   283→      setValidationErrors(prev => {
   284→        const newErrors = { ...prev };
   285→        delete newErrors[fieldId];
   286→        return newErrors;
   287→      });
   288→    }
   289→  };
   290→
   291→  const handleCheckboxChange = (fieldId: string, option: string, checked: boolean) => {
   292→    setFormData(prev => {
   293→      const currentValues = prev[fieldId] || [];
   294→      if (checked) {
   295→        return { ...prev, [fieldId]: [...currentValues, option] };
   296→      } else {
   297→        return { ...prev, [fieldId]: currentValues.filter((v: string) => v !== option) };
   298→      }
   299→    });
   300→  };
   301→
   302→  const renderField = (field: any) => {
   303→    const hasError = validationErrors[field.id];
   304→
   305→    switch (field.field_type as FieldType) {
   306→      case 'text':
   307→      case 'email':
   308→      case 'number':
   309→        if (field.allow_multiple) {
   310→          const answers = multipleAnswers[field.id] || [''];
   311→          return (
   312→            <div key={field.id} className="space-y-2">
   313→              <Label htmlFor={field.id}>
   314→                <span dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: field.label }} style={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' }} />
   315→                {field.required && <span className="text-red-500 ml-1">*</span>}
   316→              </Label>
   317→              {answers.map((answer, index) => (
   318→                <div key={index} className="flex gap-2 items-center">
   319→                  <span className="text-gray-600 font-medium min-w-[24px]">{index + 1}.</span>
   320→                  <Input
   321→                    type={field.field_type}
   322→                    value={answer}
   323→                    onChange={(e) => {
   324→                      const newAnswers = [...answers];
   325→                      newAnswers[index] = e.target.value;
   326→                      setMultipleAnswers(prev => ({ ...prev, [field.id]: newAnswers }));
   327→                      handleFieldChange(field.id, newAnswers.filter(a => a.trim()));
   328→                    }}
   329→                    className={`auth-input flex-1 ${hasError ? 'border-red-500' : ''}`}
   330→                  />
   331→                  {index === answers.length - 1 && (
   332→                    <Button
   333→                      type="button"
   334→                      onClick={() => {
   335→                        setMultipleAnswers(prev => ({
   336→                          ...prev,
   337→                          [field.id]: [...answers, '']
   338→                        }));
   339→                      }}
   340→                      style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}
   341→                      className="hover:opacity-90"
   342→                    >
   343→                      +
   344→                    </Button>
   345→                  )}
   346→                  {answers.length > 1 && (
   347→                    <Button
   348→                      type="button"
   349→                      variant="outline"
   350→                      onClick={() => {
   351→                        const newAnswers = answers.filter((_, i) => i !== index);
   352→                        setMultipleAnswers(prev => ({ ...prev, [field.id]: newAnswers }));
   353→                        handleFieldChange(field.id, newAnswers.filter(a => a.trim()));
   354→                      }}
   355→                      className="hover:bg-red-50 hover:text-red-700"
   356→                    >
   357→                      ×
   358→                    </Button>
   359→                  )}
   360→                </div>
   361→              ))}
   362→              {hasError && <p className="text-sm text-red-500">{hasError}</p>}
   363→            </div>
   364→          );
   365→        }
   366→        return (
   367→          <div key={field.id} className="space-y-2">
   368→            <Label htmlFor={field.id}>

   370→              {field.required && <span className="text-red-500 ml-1">*</span>}
   371→            </Label>
   372→            <Input
   373→              id={field.id}
   374→              type={field.field_type}
   375→              value={formData[field.id] || ''}
   376→              onChange={(e) => handleFieldChange(field.id, e.target.value)}
   377→              className={`auth-input ${hasError ? 'border-red-500' : ''}`}
   378→            />
   379→            {field.allow_attachments && (

   381→                <div
   382→                  className="border-2 border-dashed border-gray-300 rounded-lg p-6 text-center bg-gray-50 hover:bg-gray-100 transition-colors cursor-pointer"
   383→                  onDragOver={(e) => {
   384→                    e.preventDefault();
   385→                    e.currentTarget.classList.add('border-[#3e8692]', 'bg-blue-50');
   386→                  }}
   387→                  onDragLeave={(e) => {
   388→                    e.currentTarget.classList.remove('border-[#3e8692]', 'bg-blue-50');
   389→                  }}
   390→                  onDrop={(e) => {
   391→                    e.preventDefault();
   392→                    e.currentTarget.classList.remove('border-[#3e8692]', 'bg-blue-50');
   393→                    const files = Array.from(e.dataTransfer.files);
   394→                    if (files.length > 0) {
   395→                      setUploadedFiles(prev => ({

   397→                        [field.id]: [...(prev[field.id] || []), ...files]
   398→                      }));

   401→                  onClick={() => {

   403→                    input?.click();
   404→                  }}
   405→                >
   406→                  <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
   407→                    <Upload className="w-4 h-4 text-gray-500" />
   408→                    <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Drag files here or click to upload</p>
   409→                  </div>
   410→                  <Input
   411→                    id={`file-${field.id}`}
   412→                    type="file"
   413→                    multiple
   414→                    onChange={(e) => {
   415→                      const files = Array.from(e.target.files || []);
   416→                      if (files.length > 0) {
   417→                        setUploadedFiles(prev => ({
   418→                          ...prev,
   419→                          [field.id]: [...(prev[field.id] || []), ...files]
   420→                        }));
   421→                      }
   422→                    }}
   423→                    className="hidden"
   424→                  />
   425→                </div>
   426→                {uploadedFiles[field.id] && uploadedFiles[field.id].length > 0 && (
   427→                  <div className="space-y-1">
   428→                    {uploadedFiles[field.id].map((file, index) => (
   429→                      <div key={index} className="flex items-center justify-between text-sm bg-gray-50 p-2 rounded">
   430→                        <span className="text-gray-700">{file.name}</span>
   431→                        <Button
   432→                          type="button"
   433→                          variant="ghost"
   434→                          size="sm"
   435→                          onClick={() => {

   437→                              ...prev,
   438→                              [field.id]: prev[field.id].filter((_, i) => i !== index)
   439→                            }));
   440→                          }}
   441→                          className="h-6 w-6 p-0 hover:bg-red-50 hover:text-red-700"
   442→                        >
   443→                          ×
   444→                        </Button>
   445→                      </div>
   446→                    ))}
   447→                  </div>
   448→                )}
   449→              </div>
   450→            )}
   451→            {hasError && <p className="text-sm text-red-500">{hasError}</p>}
   452→          </div>
   453→        );
   454→
   455→      case 'textarea':
   456→        if (field.allow_multiple) {

   458→          return (

   462→                {field.required && <span className="text-red-500 ml-1">*</span>}

   473→                      handleFieldChange(field.id, newAnswers.filter(a => a.trim()));
   474→                    }}

   476→                    className={`auth-input flex-1 ${hasError ? 'border-red-500' : ''}`}
   477→                  />
   478→                  {index === answers.length - 1 && (
   479→                    <Button
   480→                      type="button"
   481→                      onClick={() => {
   482→                        setMultipleAnswers(prev => ({
   483→                          ...prev,
   484→                          [field.id]: [...answers, '']
   485→                        }));
   486→                      }}

   488→                      className="hover:opacity-90"
   489→                    >
   490→                      +
   491→                    </Button>
   492→                  )}
   493→                  {answers.length > 1 && (
   494→                    <Button
   495→                      type="button"
   496→                      variant="outline"
   497→                      onClick={() => {
   498→                        const newAnswers = answers.filter((_, i) => i !== index);
   499→                        setMultipleAnswers(prev => ({ ...prev, [field.id]: newAnswers }));
   500→                        handleFieldChange(field.id, newAnswers.filter(a => a.trim()));
   501→                      }}
   502→                      className="hover:bg-red-50 hover:text-red-700"
   503→                    >
   504→                      ×
   505→                    </Button>
   506→                  )}
   507→                </div>
   508→              ))}
   509→              {hasError && <p className="text-sm text-red-500">{hasError}</p>}
   510→            </div>
   511→          );
   512→        }
   513→        return (
   514→          <div key={field.id} className="space-y-2">
   515→            <Label htmlFor={field.id}>
   516→              <span dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: field.label }} style={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' }} />
   517→              {field.required && <span className="text-red-500 ml-1">*</span>}
   518→            </Label>
   519→            <Textarea
   520→              id={field.id}
   521→              value={formData[field.id] || ''}
   522→              onChange={(e) => handleFieldChange(field.id, e.target.value)}
   523→              rows={4}
   524→              className={`auth-input ${hasError ? 'border-red-500' : ''}`}
   525→            />
   526→            {field.allow_attachments && (
   527→              <div className="space-y-2">
   528→                <div
   529→                  className="border-2 border-dashed border-gray-300 rounded-lg p-6 text-center bg-gray-50 hover:bg-gray-100 transition-colors cursor-pointer"
   530→                  onDragOver={(e) => {
   531→                    e.preventDefault();
   532→                    e.currentTarget.classList.add('border-[#3e8692]', 'bg-blue-50');
   533→                  }}
   534→                  onDragLeave={(e) => {
   535→                    e.currentTarget.classList.remove('border-[#3e8692]', 'bg-blue-50');
   536→                  }}
   537→                  onDrop={(e) => {
   538→                    e.preventDefault();
   539→                    e.currentTarget.classList.remove('border-[#3e8692]', 'bg-blue-50');
   540→                    const files = Array.from(e.dataTransfer.files);
   541→                    if (files.length > 0) {
   542→                      setUploadedFiles(prev => ({
   543→                        ...prev,
   544→                        [field.id]: [...(prev[field.id] || []), ...files]
   545→                      }));
   546→                    }
   547→                  }}
   548→                  onClick={() => {
   549→                    const input = document.getElementById(`file-${field.id}`) as HTMLInputElement;
   550→                    input?.click();
   551→                  }}
   552→                >
   553→                  <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
   554→                    <Upload className="w-4 h-4 text-gray-500" />
   555→                    <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Drag files here or click to upload</p>
   556→                  </div>
   557→                  <Input
   558→                    id={`file-${field.id}`}
   559→                    type="file"
   560→                    multiple
   561→                    onChange={(e) => {
   562→                      const files = Array.from(e.target.files || []);
   563→                      if (files.length > 0) {
   564→                        setUploadedFiles(prev => ({
   565→                          ...prev,
   566→                          [field.id]: [...(prev[field.id] || []), ...files]
   567→                        }));
   568→                      }
   569→                    }}
   570→                    className="hidden"
   571→                  />
   572→                </div>
   573→                {uploadedFiles[field.id] && uploadedFiles[field.id].length > 0 && (
   574→                  <div className="space-y-1">
   575→                    {uploadedFiles[field.id].map((file, index) => (
   576→                      <div key={index} className="flex items-center justify-between text-sm bg-gray-50 p-2 rounded">
   577→                        <span className="text-gray-700">{file.name}</span>
   578→                        <Button
   579→                          type="button"
   580→                          variant="ghost"
   581→                          size="sm"
   582→                          onClick={() => {
   583→                            setUploadedFiles(prev => ({
   584→                              ...prev,
   585→                              [field.id]: prev[field.id].filter((_, i) => i !== index)
   586→                            }));
   587→                          }}
   588→                          className="h-6 w-6 p-0 hover:bg-red-50 hover:text-red-700"
   589→                        >
   590→                          ×
   591→                        </Button>
   592→                      </div>
   593→                    ))}
   594→                  </div>
   595→                )}
   596→              </div>
   597→            )}
   598→            {hasError && <p className="text-sm text-red-500">{hasError}</p>}
   599→          </div>
   600→        );
   601→
   602→      case 'date':
   603→        return (
   604→          <div key={field.id} className="space-y-2">
   605→            <Label htmlFor={field.id}>
   606→              <span dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: field.label }} style={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' }} />
   607→              {field.required && <span className="text-red-500 ml-1">*</span>}
   608→            </Label>
   609→            <Popover>
   610→              <PopoverTrigger asChild>
   611→                <Button
   612→                  variant="outline"
   613→                  className={`auth-input w-full justify-start text-left font-normal ${hasError ? 'border-red-500' : ''}`}
   614→                  style={{
   615→                    borderColor: hasError ? '#ef4444' : '#e5e7eb',
   616→                    backgroundColor: 'white',
   617→                    color: formData[field.id] ? '#111827' : '#9ca3af'
   618→                  }}
   619→                >
   620→                  <CalendarIcon className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
   621→                  {formData[field.id] ? formatDate(formData[field.id]) : "Select date"}
   622→                </Button>
   623→              </PopoverTrigger>
   624→              <PopoverContent className="w-auto p-0" align="start">
   625→                <Calendar
   626→                  mode="single"
   627→                  selected={parseDateFromInput(formData[field.id])}
   628→                  onSelect={(date) => handleFieldChange(field.id, formatDateForInput(date))}
   629→                  initialFocus
   630→                  classNames={{
   631→                    day_selected: "text-white hover:text-white focus:text-white",
   632→                  }}
   633→                  modifiersStyles={{
   634→                    selected: { backgroundColor: "#3e8692" }
   635→                  }}
   636→                />
   637→              </PopoverContent>
   638→            </Popover>
   639→            {hasError && <p className="text-sm text-red-500">{hasError}</p>}
   640→          </div>
   641→        );
   642→
   643→      case 'select':
   644→        const selectedValue = otherFieldSelected[field.id] ? '__OTHER__' : (formData[field.id] || '');
   645→        const showYesReason = field.require_yes_reason && selectedValue.toLowerCase() === 'yes';
   646→        const showNoReason = field.require_no_reason && selectedValue.toLowerCase() === 'no';
   647→
   648→        return (
   649→          <div key={field.id} className="space-y-2">
   650→            <Label htmlFor={field.id}>
   651→              <span dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: field.label }} style={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' }} />
   652→              {field.required && <span className="text-red-500 ml-1">*</span>}
   653→            </Label>
   654→            <Select
   655→              value={selectedValue}
   656→              onValueChange={(value) => {
   657→                if (value === '__OTHER__') {
   658→                  // Mark that Other is selected
   659→                  setOtherFieldSelected(prev => ({ ...prev, [field.id]: true }));
   660→                  handleFieldChange(field.id, otherFieldValues[field.id] || '');
   661→                } else {
   662→                  // Regular option selected
   663→                  setOtherFieldSelected(prev => ({ ...prev, [field.id]: false }));
   664→                  handleFieldChange(field.id, value);
   665→                  // Clear the other field value
   666→                  setOtherFieldValues(prev => {
   667→                    const newValues = { ...prev };
   668→                    delete newValues[field.id];
   669→                    return newValues;
   670→                  });
   671→
   672→                  // Clear reason if switching away from Yes/No
   673→                  if (value.toLowerCase() !== 'yes' && value.toLowerCase() !== 'no') {
   674→                    setYesNoReasons(prev => {
   675→                      const newReasons = { ...prev };
   676→                      delete newReasons[field.id];
   677→                      return newReasons;
   678→                    });
   679→                  }
   680→                }
   681→              }}
   682→            >
   683→              <SelectTrigger className={`auth-input ${hasError ? 'border-red-500' : ''}`}>
   684→                <SelectValue placeholder="Select an option" />
   685→              </SelectTrigger>
   686→              <SelectContent>
   687→                {field.options?.map((option: string) => (
   688→                  <SelectItem key={option} value={option}>
   689→                    {option}
   690→                  </SelectItem>
   691→                ))}
   692→                {field.include_other && (
   693→                  <SelectItem value="__OTHER__">Other</SelectItem>
   694→                )}
   695→              </SelectContent>
   696→            </Select>
   697→            {otherFieldSelected[field.id] && (
   698→              <Input
   699→                placeholder="Please specify..."
   700→                value={otherFieldValues[field.id] || ''}
   701→                onChange={(e) => {
   702→                  const value = e.target.value;
   703→                  setOtherFieldValues(prev => ({ ...prev, [field.id]: value }));
   704→                  // Store the actual value in formData
   705→                  handleFieldChange(field.id, value);
   706→                }}
   707→                className="auth-input mt-2"
   708→              />
   709→            )}
   710→            {showYesReason && (
   711→              <div className="mt-2">
   712→                <Textarea
   713→                  id={`${field.id}-yes-reason`}
   714→                  value={yesNoReasons[field.id] || ''}
   715→                  onChange={(e) => {
   716→                    setYesNoReasons(prev => ({ ...prev, [field.id]: e.target.value }));
   717→                  }}
   718→                  className="auth-input"
   719→                  rows={3}
   720→                />
   721→              </div>
   722→            )}
   723→            {showNoReason && (
   724→              <div className="mt-2">
   725→                <Textarea
   726→                  id={`${field.id}-no-reason`}
   727→                  value={yesNoReasons[field.id] || ''}
   728→                  onChange={(e) => {
   729→                    setYesNoReasons(prev => ({ ...prev, [field.id]: e.target.value }));
   730→                  }}
   731→                  className="auth-input"
   732→                  rows={3}
   733→                />
   734→              </div>
   735→            )}
   736→            {hasError && <p className="text-sm text-red-500">{hasError}</p>}
   737→          </div>
   738→        );
   739→
   740→      case 'radio':
   741→        return (
   742→          <div key={field.id} className="space-y-2">
   743→            <Label>
   744→              <span dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: field.label }} style={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' }} />
   745→              {field.required && <span className="text-red-500 ml-1">*</span>}
   746→            </Label>
   747→            <RadioGroup value={formData[field.id] || ''} onValueChange={(value) => handleFieldChange(field.id, value)}>
   748→              <div className="space-y-2">
   749→                {field.options?.map((option: string) => (
   750→                  <div key={option} className="flex items-center space-x-2">
   751→                    <RadioGroupItem value={option} id={`${field.id}-${option}`} />
   752→                    <Label htmlFor={`${field.id}-${option}`} className="font-normal cursor-pointer">
   753→                      {option}
   754→                    </Label>
   755→                  </div>
   756→                ))}
   757→              </div>
   758→            </RadioGroup>
   759→            {hasError && <p className="text-sm text-red-500">{hasError}</p>}
   760→          </div>
   761→        );
   762→
   763→      case 'checkbox':
   764→        return (
   765→          <div key={field.id} className="space-y-2">
   766→            <Label>
   767→              <span dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: field.label }} style={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' }} />
   768→              {field.required && <span className="text-red-500 ml-1">*</span>}
   769→            </Label>
   770→            <div className="space-y-2">
   771→              {field.options?.map((option: string) => (
   772→                <div key={option} className="flex items-center space-x-2">
   773→                  <Checkbox
   774→                    id={`${field.id}-${option}`}
   775→                    checked={formData[field.id]?.includes(option) || false}
   776→                    onCheckedChange={(checked) => handleCheckboxChange(field.id, option, checked as boolean)}
   777→                  />
   778→                  <Label htmlFor={`${field.id}-${option}`} className="font-normal cursor-pointer">
   779→                    {option}
   780→                  </Label>
   781→                </div>
   782→              ))}
   783→              {field.include_other && (
   784→                <>
   785→                  <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
   786→                    <Checkbox
   787→                      id={`${field.id}-__OTHER__`}
   788→                      checked={formData[field.id]?.includes('__OTHER__') || false}
   789→                      onCheckedChange={(checked) => {
   790→                        handleCheckboxChange(field.id, '__OTHER__', checked as boolean);
   791→                        if (!checked) {
   792→                          // Clear the other field value when unchecked
   793→                          setOtherFieldValues(prev => ({ ...prev, [field.id]: '' }));
   794→                        }
   795→                      }}
   796→                    />
   797→                    <Label htmlFor={`${field.id}-__OTHER__`} className="font-normal cursor-pointer">
   798→                      Other
   799→                    </Label>
   800→                  </div>
   801→                  {formData[field.id]?.includes('__OTHER__') && (
   802→                    <Input
   803→                      placeholder="Please specify..."
   804→                      value={otherFieldValues[field.id] || ''}
   805→                      onChange={(e) => setOtherFieldValues(prev => ({ ...prev, [field.id]: e.target.value }))}
   806→                      className="ml-6"
   807→                    />
   808→                  )}
   809→                </>
   810→              )}
   811→            </div>
   812→            {hasError && <p className="text-sm text-red-500">{hasError}</p>}
   813→          </div>
   814→        );
   815→
   816→      case 'section':
   817→        return (
   818→          <div key={field.id} className="py-4">
   819→            <div className="font-bold text-gray-900 border-b-2 border-gray-300 pb-2" style={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' }} dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: field.label }} />
   820→          </div>
   821→        );
   822→
   823→      case 'description':
   824→        return (
   825→          <div key={field.id} className="py-2">
   826→            <div className="text-gray-600" style={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' }} dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: field.label }} />
   827→          </div>
   828→        );
   829→
   830→      case 'link':
   831→        try {
   832→          const linkUrl = (Array.isArray(field.options) && field.options.length > 0) ? field.options[0] : '';
   833→          const linkTitle = field.label ? String(field.label).replace(/<[^>]*>/g, '').trim() || 'Embedded content' : 'Embedded content';
   834→
   835→          if (!linkUrl) {
   836→            return null;
   837→          }
   838→
   839→          return (
   840→            <div key={field.id} className="space-y-2">
   841→              {field.label && typeof field.label === 'string' && (
   842→                <div className="font-medium text-gray-900" dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: field.label }} style={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' }} />
   843→              )}
   844→              <div className="w-full border rounded-lg overflow-hidden bg-gray-50">
   845→                <iframe
   846→                  src={linkUrl}
   847→                  className="w-full"
   848→                  style={{ height: '600px', border: 'none' }}
   849→                  title={linkTitle}
   850→                  allowFullScreen
   851→                />
   852→              </div>
   853→            </div>
   854→          );
   855→        } catch (error) {
   856→          console.error('Error rendering link field:', error);
   857→          return null;
   858→        }
   859→
   860→      default:
   861→        return null;
   862→    }
   863→  };
   864→
   865→  // Loading state
   866→  if (loading) {
   867→    return (
   868→      <div className="min-h-screen bg-white flex items-center justify-center">
   869→        <div className="text-center">
   870→          <Loader className="h-12 w-12 animate-spin text-[#3e8692] mx-auto mb-4" />
   871→          <p className="text-gray-600 text-lg font-medium">Loading form...</p>
   872→        </div>
   873→      </div>
   874→    );
   875→  }
   876→
   877→  // Error state
   878→  if (error) {
   879→    return (
   880→      <div className="min-h-screen bg-white flex items-center justify-center px-6">
   881→        <div className="text-center max-w-md">
   882→          <div className="flex justify-center mb-6">
   883→            <Image src="/images/logo.png" alt="Logo" width={60} height={60} className="rounded-xl" />
   884→          </div>
   885→          <div className="rounded-full bg-red-50 p-4 w-20 h-20 mx-auto mb-6 flex items-center justify-center">
   886→            <FileText className="h-10 w-10 text-red-500" />
   887→          </div>
   888→          <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">Form Not Available</h2>
   889→          <p className="text-lg text-gray-600 leading-relaxed">{error}</p>
   890→        </div>
   891→      </div>
   892→    );
   893→  }
   894→
   895→  // Success state - only show full-page success if thank you page is NOT enabled
   896→  if (submitted && !form?.enable_thank_you_page) {
   897→    return (
   898→      <div className="min-h-screen bg-white flex items-center justify-center px-6">
   899→        <div className="text-center max-w-md">
   900→          <div className="flex justify-center mb-6">
   901→            <Image src="/images/logo.png" alt="Logo" width={60} height={60} className="rounded-xl" />
   902→          </div>
   903→          <div className="rounded-full bg-green-50 p-4 w-20 h-20 mx-auto mb-6 flex items-center justify-center">
   904→            <CheckCircle2 className="h-10 w-10 text-green-600" />
   905→          </div>
   906→          <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">Thank you!</h2>
   907→          <p className="text-lg text-gray-600 leading-relaxed">Your response has been submitted successfully.</p>
   908→        </div>
   909→      </div>
   910→    );
   911→  }
   912→
   913→  // Form state
   914→  return (
   915→    <div className="min-h-screen bg-white">
   916→      <div className="max-w-2xl mx-auto px-6 py-16">
   917→        {/* Logo and Title */}
   918→        <div className="text-center mb-12">
   919→          <div className="flex justify-center mb-6">
   920→            <Image src="/images/logo.png" alt="Logo" width={60} height={60} className="rounded-xl" />
   921→          </div>
   922→          <h1 className="text-4xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">{form?.name}</h1>
   923→          {form?.description && (
   924→            <p className="text-lg text-gray-600 leading-relaxed max-w-xl mx-auto">{form.description}</p>
   925→          )}
   926→        </div>
   927→
   928→        {/* Form Content */}
   929→        <div className="max-w-xl mx-auto">
   930→          <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-8">
   931→              {/* Page indicator */}
   932→              {totalPages > 1 && (
   933→                <div className="flex justify-center mb-8">
   934→                  <div className="flex gap-2">
   935→                    {Array.from({ length: totalPages }, (_, i) => i + 1).map((pageNum) => (
   936→                      <div
   937→                        key={pageNum}
   938→                        className={`h-2 rounded-full transition-all duration-300 ${
   939→                          pageNum === currentPage
   940→                            ? 'bg-[#3e8692] w-8'
   941→                            : pageNum < currentPage
   942→                            ? 'bg-[#3e8692] opacity-30 w-2'
   943→                            : 'bg-gray-300 w-2'
   944→                        }`}
   945→                      />
   946→                    ))}
   947→                  </div>
   948→                </div>
   949→              )}
   950→
   951→              {/* Form fields for current page */}
   952→              {form?.fields
   953→                .filter(field => field.page_number === currentPage)
   954→                .map(field => renderField(field))}
   955→
   956→              {/* Navigation buttons - hide when on thank you page after submission */}
   957→              {!(form?.enable_thank_you_page && currentPage === totalPages && submitted) && (
   958→                <div className="pt-8 flex gap-4 justify-center items-center">
   959→                  {currentPage > 1 && !submitted && (
   960→                    <Button
   961→                      type="button"
   962→                      onClick={handlePreviousPage}
   963→                      className="px-6 h-12 text-base font-medium rounded-lg bg-white border border-gray-300 text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50 hover:border-gray-400 transition-all flex items-center gap-2"
   964→                    >
   965→                      <ChevronLeft className="h-5 w-5" />
   966→                      Previous
   967→                    </Button>
   968→                  )}
   969→                  {/* Show Next button or Submit button based on current page and thank you page setting */}
   970→                  {(form?.enable_thank_you_page && currentPage < totalPages - 1) || (!form?.enable_thank_you_page && currentPage < totalPages) ? (
   971→                    <Button
   972→                      type="button"
   973→                      onClick={handleNextPage}
   974→                      className="px-6 h-12 text-base font-medium rounded-lg bg-[#3e8692] hover:bg-[#2d6570] text-white transition-all flex items-center gap-2"
   975→                    >
   976→                      Next
   977→                      <ChevronRight className="h-5 w-5" />
   978→                    </Button>
   979→                  ) : !submitted && (
   980→                    <Button
   981→                      type="submit"
   982→                      disabled={submitting}
   983→                      className="px-6 h-12 text-base font-medium rounded-lg bg-[#3e8692] hover:bg-[#2d6570] text-white transition-all disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed flex items-center gap-2"
   984→                    >
   985→                      {submitting ? (
   986→                        <>
   987→                          <Loader className="h-5 w-5 animate-spin" />
   988→                          Submitting...
   989→                        </>
   990→                      ) : (
   991→                        <>
   992→                          Submit
   993→                          <ChevronRight className="h-5 w-5" />
   994→                        </>
   995→                      )}
   996→                    </Button>
   997→                  )}
   998→                </div>
   999→              )}
  1000→
  1001→            </form>
  1002→          </div>
  1003→        </div>
  1004→      </div>
  1005→  );
  1006→}
  1007→
  1008→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
   237→
   238→  // Check if user is already authenticated via cache
   239→  const checkCachedAuth = () => {
   240→    if (!clientEmail) return;
   241→
   242→    try {
   243→      const cached = localStorage.getItem(cacheKey);
   244→      if (cached) {
   245→        const { email: cachedEmail, timestamp } = JSON.parse(cached);
   246→        const now = Date.now();
   247→
   248→        if (now - timestamp < CACHE_DURATION) {
   249→          if (cachedEmail && cachedEmail.toLowerCase() === clientEmail.toLowerCase()) {
   250→            setEmail(cachedEmail);
   251→            setIsAuthenticated(true); // Start loading data immediately
   252→            setWelcomePhase('enter');
   253→            setShowWelcome(true);
   254→            requestAnimationFrame(() => {
   255→              setTimeout(() => setWelcomePhase('ready'), 50);
   256→            });
   257→            return;
   258→          }
   259→        }
   260→        localStorage.removeItem(cacheKey);
   261→      }
   262→    } catch (error) {
   263→      console.error('Error checking cached auth:', error);
   264→      localStorage.removeItem(cacheKey);
   265→    }
   266→  };
   267→
   268→  // Save authentication to cache
   269→  const saveAuthToCache = (email: string) => {
   270→    try {
   271→      const authData = {
   272→        email,
   273→        clientId,
   274→        timestamp: Date.now()
   275→      };
   276→      localStorage.setItem(cacheKey, JSON.stringify(authData));
   277→      // Save global portal auth for cross-page navigation (campaign/report pages)
   278→      const globalAuthData = {
   279→        email,
   280→        clientId,
   281→        clientEmail,
   282→        timestamp: Date.now()
   283→      };
   284→      localStorage.setItem('portal_global_auth', JSON.stringify(globalAuthData));
   285→    } catch (error) {
   286→      console.error('Error saving auth to cache:', error);
   287→    }
   288→  };
   289→
   290→  const handleEmailSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
   291→    e.preventDefault();
   292→    setEmailError('');

   294→    const emailRegex = /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/;

   296→      setEmailError('Please enter a valid email address');

   299→

   304→
```

```text
    72→
    73→const formatDate = (dateString: string) =>
    74→  new Date(dateString).toLocaleDateString('en-US', { year: 'numeric', month: 'short', day: 'numeric' });
    75→
    76→const formatCurrency = (amount: number | null | undefined) => {
    77→  if (!amount) return '$0';
    78→  return new Intl.NumberFormat('en-US', { style: 'currency', currency: 'USD' }).format(amount);
    79→};
    80→
    81→const formatFollowers = (followers: number | null): string => {
    82→  if (!followers) return '0';
    83→  if (followers >= 1000000) return `${(followers / 1000000).toFixed(1)}M`;
    84→  if (followers >= 1000) return `${(followers / 1000).toFixed(1)}K`;
    85→  return followers.toString();
    86→};
    87→
    88→const getRegionIcon = (region: string) => {
    89→  const regionMap: { [key: string]: { flag: string } } = {
    90→    Vietnam: { flag: '🇻🇳' },
    91→    Turkey: { flag: '🇹🇷' },
    92→    SEA: { flag: '🌏' },
    93→    Philippines: { flag: '🇵🇭' },
    94→    Korea: { flag: '🇰🇷' },
    95→    Global: { flag: '🌍' },
    96→    China: { flag: '🇨🇳' },
    97→    Brazil: { flag: '🇧🇷' },
    98→  };
    99→  return regionMap[region] || { flag: '🏳️' };
   100→};
```
